Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * Well Ordered Sets *)

(** In this file our goal is to prove Zorn's Lemma and Zermelo's Well-Ordering Theorem. *)

Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.DecidablePropositions.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Propositions.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Subtypes.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Sets.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.AxiomOfChoice.
Require Import UniMath.OrderTheory.OrderedSets.OrderedSets.

Local Open Scope logic.
Local Open Scope set.
Local Open Scope subtype.
Local Open Scope poset.

Declare Scope tosubset.
Delimit Scope tosubset with tosubset. (* subsets equipped with a well ordering *)
Local Open Scope tosubset.

Declare Scope wosubset.
Delimit Scope wosubset with wosubset. (* subsets equipped with a well ordering *)
Local Open Scope wosubset.

(** ** Totally ordered subsets of a set *)

Definition TotalOrdering (S:hSet) : hSet := ∑ (R : hrel_set S), hProp_to_hSet (isTotalOrder R).

Definition TOSubset_set (X:hSet) : hSet := ∑ (S:subtype_set X), TotalOrdering (carrier_subset S).

Definition TOSubset (X:hSet) : UU := TOSubset_set X.

Definition TOSubset_to_subtype {X:hSet} : TOSubset X -> hsubtype X
  := pr1.

Coercion TOSubset_to_subtype : TOSubset >-> hsubtype.

Local Definition TOSrel {X:hSet} (S : TOSubset X) : hrel (carrier_subset S) := pr12 S.

Notation "s ≤ s'" := (TOSrel _ s s') : tosubset.

Definition TOtotal {X:hSet} (S : TOSubset X) : isTotalOrder (TOSrel S) := pr22 S.

Definition TOtot {X:hSet} (S : TOSubset X) : istotal (TOSrel S) := pr222 S.

Definition TOanti {X:hSet} (S : TOSubset X) : isantisymm (TOSrel S) := pr2 (pr122 S).

Definition TOrefl {X:hSet} (S : TOSubset X) : isrefl (TOSrel S) := pr211 (pr22 S).


X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
∀ s t : (∑ y, S y)%subset, s = t ⇒ s ≤ t


X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
∀ s t : (∑ y, S y)%subset, s = t ⇒ s ≤ t

  
X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
s, t: (∑ y, S y)%subset
e: s = t
s ≤ t
 
X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
s: (∑ y, S y)%subset
s ≤ s
 apply TOrefl.
Defined.


X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
∀ s t : (∑ y, S y)%subset, pr1 s = pr1 t ⇒ s ≤ t


X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
∀ s t : (∑ y, S y)%subset, pr1 s = pr1 t ⇒ s ≤ t

  
X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
s, t: (∑ y, S y)%subset
e: pr1 s = pr1 t
s ≤ t
 
X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
s: (∑ y, S y)%subset
e: pr1 s = pr1 s
s ≤ s
 apply TOrefl.
Defined.


X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
istrans (TOSrel S)


X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
istrans (TOSrel S)

  apply (pr2 S).
Defined.


X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
r, s, t, u: S
r ≤ t → pr1 r = pr1 s → pr1 t = pr1 u → s ≤ u


X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
r, s, t, u: S
r ≤ t → pr1 r = pr1 s → pr1 t = pr1 u → s ≤ u

  
X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
r, s, t, u: S
le: r ≤ t
p: (pr1 r = pr1 s)%type
q: (pr1 t = pr1 u)%type
s ≤ u
 
X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
r, t, u: S
le: r ≤ t
p: (pr1 r = pr1 r)%type
q: (pr1 t = pr1 u)%type
r ≤ u
 
X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
r, t: S
le: r ≤ t
p: (pr1 r = pr1 r)%type
q: (pr1 t = pr1 t)%type
r ≤ t
 exact le.
Defined.

Definition tosub_order_compat {X:hSet} {S T : TOSubset X} (le : S ⊆ T) : hProp
  := ∀ s s' : S, s ≤ s' ⇒ subtype_inc le s ≤ subtype_inc le s'.

Definition tosub_le (X:hSet) (S T : TOSubset X) : hProp
  := (∑ le : S ⊆ T, tosub_order_compat le)%prop.

Notation "S ≼ T" := (tosub_le _ S T) (at level 70) : tosubset.

Definition sub_initial {X:hSet} {S : hsubtype X} {T : TOSubset X} (le : S ⊆ T) : hProp
  := ∀ (s t : X) (Ss : S s) (Tt : T t), TOSrel T (t,,Tt) (s,,le s Ss) ⇒ S t.

Definition same_induced_ordering {X:hSet} {S T : TOSubset X} {B : hsubtype X} (BS : B ⊆ S) (BT : B ⊆ T)
  := ∀ x y : B,
             subtype_inc BS x ≤ subtype_inc BS y
                         ⇔
             subtype_inc BT x ≤ subtype_inc BT y.

Definition common_initial {X:hSet} (B : hsubtype X) (S T : TOSubset X) : hProp
  := (∑ (BS : B ⊆ S) (BT : B ⊆ T), sub_initial BS ∧ sub_initial BT ∧ same_induced_ordering BS BT)%prop.

(* the largest initial common ordered subset of S and of T, as the union of all of them *)
Definition max_common_initial {X:hSet} (S T : TOSubset X) : hsubtype X
  := λ x, ∃ (B : hsubtype X), B x ∧ common_initial B S T.


X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
A: hsubtype X
common_initial A S T → A ⊆ max_common_initial S T

S, T: TOSubset X

common_initial A S T → A ⊆ max_common_initial S T

  
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
A: hsubtype X
c: common_initial A S T
x: X
Ax: A x
max_common_initial S T x
 exact (hinhpr (A,,Ax,,c)).
Defined.

X: hSet

X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
(∑ BT : max_common_initial S T ⊆ T,
 sub_initial (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
 ∧ sub_initial BT
   ∧ same_induced_ordering
       (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) BT)%prop

  
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
sub_initial (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
∧ sub_initial (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
  ∧ same_induced_ordering
      (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
      (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))

X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
same_induced_ordering
  (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
  (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))

  
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
x, y: max_common_initial S T
subtype_inc (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) x
≤ subtype_inc (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) y
⇔ subtype_inc (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) x
  ≤ subtype_inc (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
      y

  
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
x, y: max_common_initial S T
subtype_inc (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) x
≤ subtype_inc (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) y
⇒ subtype_inc (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) x
  ≤ subtype_inc (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
      y
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
x, y: max_common_initial S T
subtype_inc (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) x
≤ subtype_inc (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) y
⇒ subtype_inc (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) x
  ≤ subtype_inc (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
      y

  
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
x, y: max_common_initial S T
subtype_inc (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) x
≤ subtype_inc (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) y
⇒ subtype_inc (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) x
  ≤ subtype_inc (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
      y
 
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
x, y: max_common_initial S T
le: subtype_inc (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
  x
≤ subtype_inc
    (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) y
subtype_inc (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) x
≤ subtype_inc (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) y
 
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
x: X
xm: max_common_initial S T x
y: X
ym: max_common_initial S T y
le: subtype_inc (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
  (x,, xm)
≤ subtype_inc
    (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
    (y,, ym)
subtype_inc (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
  (x,, xm)
≤ subtype_inc (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
    (y,, ym)

    
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
x: X
xm: max_common_initial S T x
y: X
ym: max_common_initial S T y
le: subtype_inc (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
  (x,, xm)
≤ subtype_inc
    (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
    (y,, ym)
B: hsubtype X
Bx: B x
BS: B ⊆ S
BT: B ⊆ T
BSi: sub_initial BS
BTi: sub_initial BT
BST: same_induced_ordering BS BT
subtype_inc (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
  (x,, xm)
≤ subtype_inc (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
    (y,, ym)

    
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
x: X
xm: max_common_initial S T x
y: X
ym: max_common_initial S T y
le: subtype_inc (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
  (x,, xm)
≤ subtype_inc
    (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
    (y,, ym)
B: hsubtype X
Bx: B x
BS: B ⊆ S
BT: B ⊆ T
BSi: sub_initial BS
BTi: sub_initial BT
BST: same_induced_ordering BS BT
C: hsubtype X
Cy: C y
CS: C ⊆ S
CT: C ⊆ T
CSi: sub_initial CS
CTi: sub_initial CT
CST: same_induced_ordering CS CT
subtype_inc (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
  (x,, xm)
≤ subtype_inc (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
    (y,, ym)

    
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
x: X
xm: max_common_initial S T x
y: X
ym: max_common_initial S T y
le: subtype_inc (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
  (x,, xm)
≤ subtype_inc
    (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
    (y,, ym)
B: hsubtype X
Bx: B x
BS: B ⊆ S
BT: B ⊆ T
BSi: sub_initial BS
BTi: sub_initial BT
BST: same_induced_ordering BS BT
C: hsubtype X
Cy: C y
CS: C ⊆ S
CT: C ⊆ T
CSi: sub_initial CS
CTi: sub_initial CT
CST: same_induced_ordering CS CT
C x

xm: max_common_initial S T x
y: X

  (x,, xm)
≤ subtype_inc
    (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
    (y,, ym)

→ subtype_inc CT (x,, Cx)
  ≤ subtype_inc CT (y,, Cy)
subtype_inc (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
  (x,, xm)
≤ subtype_inc (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
    (y,, ym)

B: hsubtype X
Bx: B x
BS: B ⊆ S
BT: B ⊆ T

BTi: sub_initial BT

C: hsubtype X
Cy: C y
CS: C ⊆ S
CT: C ⊆ T
CSi: sub_initial CS
CTi: sub_initial CT
CST: same_induced_ordering CS CT
Cx: C x
Q: subtype_inc CS (x,, Cx) ≤ subtype_inc CS (y,, Cy)
→ subtype_inc CT (x,, Cx)
  ≤ subtype_inc CT (y,, Cy)
E: subtype_inc CS (x,, Cx) ≤ subtype_inc CS (y,, Cy)

  (x,, xm)

 now apply (h1'' (Q E)). 
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
x, y: max_common_initial S T
subtype_inc (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) x
≤ subtype_inc (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) y
⇒ subtype_inc (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) x
  ≤ subtype_inc (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
      y

  
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
x, y: max_common_initial S T
subtype_inc (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) x
≤ subtype_inc (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) y
⇒ subtype_inc (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) x
  ≤ subtype_inc (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
      y
 
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
x, y: max_common_initial S T
le: subtype_inc (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T))
  x
≤ subtype_inc
    (pr2 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) y
subtype_inc (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) x
≤ subtype_inc (pr1 (max_common_initial_is_sub S T)) y

B: hsubtype X
Bx: B x
BS: B ⊆ S
BT: B ⊆ T

C: hsubtype X
Cy: C y

CTi: sub_initial CT

Cx: C x
Q: subtype_inc CT (x,, Cx) ≤ subtype_inc CT (y,, Cy)

  ≤ subtype_inc CS (y,, Cy)

 now apply (h1'' (Q E)). }
Defined.


X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
le: S ≼ T
s, s': S
s ≤ s'
⇔ subtype_inc (pr1 le) s ≤ subtype_inc (pr1 le) s'


X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
le: S ≼ T
s, s': S
s ≤ s'
⇔ subtype_inc (pr1 le) s ≤ subtype_inc (pr1 le) s'

  
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
le: S ≼ T
s, s': S
s ≤ s'
⇒ subtype_inc (pr1 le) s ≤ subtype_inc (pr1 le) s'
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
le: S ≼ T
s, s': S
subtype_inc (pr1 le) s ≤ subtype_inc (pr1 le) s'
⇒ s ≤ s'

  
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
le: S ≼ T
s, s': S
s ≤ s'
⇒ subtype_inc (pr1 le) s ≤ subtype_inc (pr1 le) s'
 exact (pr2 le s s'). 
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
le: S ≼ T
s, s': S
subtype_inc (pr1 le) s ≤ subtype_inc (pr1 le) s'
⇒ s ≤ s'

S, T: TOSubset X
le: S ≼ T
s, s': S
subtype_inc (pr1 le) s ≤ subtype_inc (pr1 le) s'
⇒ s ≤ s'

le: S ≼ T
s, s': S
l: subtype_inc (pr1 le) s ≤ subtype_inc (pr1 le) s'
s ≤ s'
 
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
le: S ≼ T
s, s': S
l: subtype_inc (pr1 le) s ≤ subtype_inc (pr1 le) s'
(s ≤ s') ⨿ (s' ≤ s) → s ≤ s'
 
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
le: S ≼ T
s, s': S
l: subtype_inc (pr1 le) s ≤ subtype_inc (pr1 le) s'
c: s ≤ s'
s ≤ s'
X: hSet

le: S ≼ T
s, s': S
l: subtype_inc (pr1 le) s ≤ subtype_inc (pr1 le) s'
c: s' ≤ s
s ≤ s'

    
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
le: S ≼ T
s, s': S
l: subtype_inc (pr1 le) s ≤ subtype_inc (pr1 le) s'
c: s ≤ s'
s ≤ s'
 exact c.
    
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
le: S ≼ T
s, s': S

X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
le: S ≼ T
s, s': S
l: subtype_inc (pr1 le) s ≤ subtype_inc (pr1 le) s'
c: s' ≤ s
s = s'
 
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
le: S ≼ T
s, s': S
l: subtype_inc (pr1 le) s ≤ subtype_inc (pr1 le) s'
k: subtype_inc (pr1 le) s' ≤ subtype_inc (pr1 le) s
s = s'

      
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
le: S ≼ T
s, s': S
k': (subtype_inc (pr1 le) s = subtype_inc (pr1 le) s')%type
s = s'

      
X: hSet
S, T: TOSubset X
le: S ≼ T
s, s': S
k': (subtype_inc (pr1 le) s = subtype_inc (pr1 le) s')%type
(pr1 s = pr1 s')%type
 exact (maponpaths pr1 k'). }
Defined.

(** *** Adding a point on top of a totally ordered subset *)

(** We proceed directly.  An indirect way would be to form the corresponding totally ordered
    set, add a point to it, set up an equivalence between that and the union of our subset and
    the new point (assuming decidability of equality), and transport the ordering along the
    equivalence. *)


X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
hrel (∑ y, subtype_plus S z y)%subset


X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
hrel (∑ y, subtype_plus S z y)%subset

  
X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
s: X
i: subtype_plus S z s
t: X
j: subtype_plus S z t
hProp
 
X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
s: X
i: S s ∨ (z = s)%type
t: X
j: S t ∨ (z = t)%type
hProp
 
X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
s: X
i: S s ∨ (z = s)%type
t: X
j: S t ∨ (z = t)%type
hPropset

  
X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
s, t: X
S s ⨿ (z = s)%type → S t ⨿ (z = t)%type → hPropset
X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
s, t: X
isconst_2' ?Goal

nSz: ¬ S z
s, t: X
S s ⨿ (z = s)%type → S t ⨿ (z = t)%type → hPropset

 exact (TOSrel S (s,,Ss) (t,,St)).

X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
s, t: X
ezs: (z = s)%type
ezt: (z = t)%type
hPropset
 exact htrue. } 
X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
s, t: X
isconst_2'
  (λ X0 : S s ⨿ (z = s)%type,
   match X0 with
   | inl h =>
       (λ (Ss : S s) (X1 : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type),
        match X1 with
        | inl h0 => (λ St : S t, s,, Ss ≤ t,, St) h0
        | inr p => (λ _ : z = t, htrue) p
        end) h
   | inr p =>
       (λ (_ : z = s) (X1 : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type),
        match X1 with
        | inl h => (λ _ : S t, hfalse) h
        | inr p0 => (λ _ : z = t, htrue) p0
        end) p
   end)

  
X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
s, t: X
isconst_2'
  (λ X0 : S s ⨿ (z = s)%type,
   match X0 with
   | inl h =>
       (λ (Ss : S s) (X1 : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type),
        match X1 with
        | inl h0 => (λ St : S t, s,, Ss ≤ t,, St) h0
        | inr p => (λ _ : z = t, htrue) p
        end) h
   | inr p =>
       (λ (_ : z = s) (X1 : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type),
        match X1 with
        | inl h => (λ _ : S t, hfalse) h
        | inr p0 => (λ _ : z = t, htrue) p0
        end) p
   end)
 
X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
s, t: X
∀ (x x' : S s ⨿ (z = s)%type)
(y : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type),
match x with
| inl h =>
    λ X0 : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type,
    match X0 with
    | inl h0 => s,, h ≤ t,, h0
    | inr _ => htrue
    end
| inr _ =>
    λ X0 : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type,
    match X0 with
    | inl _ => hfalse
    | inr _ => htrue
    end
end y =
match x' with
| inl h =>
    λ X0 : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type,
    match X0 with
    | inl h0 => s,, h ≤ t,, h0
    | inr _ => htrue
    end
| inr _ =>
    λ X0 : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type,
    match X0 with
    | inl _ => hfalse
    | inr _ => htrue
    end
end y
X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
s, t: X
∀ (x : S s ⨿ (z = s)%type)
(y y' : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type),
match x with
| inl h =>
    λ X0 : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type,
    match X0 with
    | inl h0 => s,, h ≤ t,, h0
    | inr _ => htrue
    end
| inr _ =>
    λ X0 : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type,
    match X0 with
    | inl _ => hfalse
    | inr _ => htrue
    end
end y =
match x with
| inl h =>
    λ X0 : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type,
    match X0 with
    | inl h0 => s,, h ≤ t,, h0
    | inr _ => htrue
    end
| inr _ =>
    λ X0 : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type,
    match X0 with
    | inl _ => hfalse
    | inr _ => htrue
    end
end y'

    
X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
s, t: X
∀ (x x' : S s ⨿ (z = s)%type)
(y : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type),
match x with
| inl h =>
    λ X0 : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type,
    match X0 with
    | inl h0 => s,, h ≤ t,, h0
    | inr _ => htrue
    end
| inr _ =>
    λ X0 : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type,
    match X0 with
    | inl _ => hfalse
    | inr _ => htrue
    end
end y =
match x' with
| inl h =>
    λ X0 : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type,
    match X0 with
    | inl h0 => s,, h ≤ t,, h0
    | inr _ => htrue
    end
| inr _ =>
    λ X0 : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type,
    match X0 with
    | inl _ => hfalse
    | inr _ => htrue
    end
end y

z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
s, t: X
Ss, Ss': S s
St: S t
(s,, Ss ≤ t,, St) = (s,, Ss' ≤ t,, St)
 now induction_hProp Ss Ss'.

z: X

 reflexivity.

X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
s, t: X
∀ (x : S s ⨿ (z = s)%type)
(y y' : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type),
match x with
| inl h =>
    λ X0 : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type,
    match X0 with
    | inl h0 => s,, h ≤ t,, h0
    | inr _ => htrue
    end
| inr _ =>
    λ X0 : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type,
    match X0 with
    | inl _ => hfalse
    | inr _ => htrue
    end
end y =
match x with
| inl h =>
    λ X0 : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type,
    match X0 with
    | inl h0 => s,, h ≤ t,, h0
    | inr _ => htrue
    end
| inr _ =>
    λ X0 : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type,
    match X0 with
    | inl _ => hfalse
    | inr _ => htrue
    end
end y'

    end
| inr _ =>
    λ X0 : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type,
    match X0 with
    | inl _ => hfalse
    | inr _ => htrue
    end
end y =

    λ X0 : S t ⨿ (z = t)%type,

z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
s: X
Ss: S s
St: S z
∅
 exact (nSz St).

S: TOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
s, t: X
Ss: S s
ezt: (z = t)%type
St': S t
htrue = (s,, Ss ≤ t,, St')

z: X

xy: x,, Sx ≤ y,, Sy

              exact (TOtrans _ _ _ _ wx xy).

yx: TOSubset_plus_point_rel S z nSz (y,, Wy) (x,, Wx)
x,, Wx = y,, Wy

Defined.

Definition TOSubset_plus_point {X:hSet} (S:TOSubset X) (z:X) (nSz : ¬ S z) : TOSubset X
  :=  subtype_plus S z,,
      TOSubset_plus_point_rel S z nSz,,
      isTotalOrder_TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz.


X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
S ⊆ TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz


X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
S ⊆ TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz

  apply subtype_plus_incl.
Defined.


X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
S ≼ TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz

X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
(λ x : S ⊆ TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz,
 (λ le : S ⊆ TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz,
  tosub_order_compat le) x) ?pr1

  
X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
S ⊆ TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz
 apply TOSubset_plus_point_incl.
  
X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
(λ x : S ⊆ TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz,
 (λ le : S ⊆ TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz,
  tosub_order_compat le) x)
  (TOSubset_plus_point_incl S z nSz)
 
X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
s, t: S
le: s ≤ t
subtype_inc (TOSubset_plus_point_incl S z nSz) s
≤ subtype_inc (TOSubset_plus_point_incl S z nSz) t
 exact le.
Defined.

Ss: S s
Tt: TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz t
le: t,, Tt
≤ s,, TOSubset_plus_point_incl S z nSz s Ss
ezt: (z = t)%type
S t
 
X: hSet
S: TOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
s: X
Ss: S s
le: ∅
S z

    exact (fromempty le).
Defined.

(** ** Well ordered subsets of a set *)

Definition hasSmallest {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : hProp
  := ∀ S : hsubtype X, (∃ x, S x) ⇒ ∃ x:X, S x ∧ ∀ y:X, S y ⇒ R x y.

Definition isWellOrder {X : hSet} (R : hrel X) : hProp := isTotalOrder R ∧ hasSmallest R.

Definition WellOrdering (S:hSet) : hSet := ∑ (R : hrel_set S), hProp_to_hSet (isWellOrder R).

Definition WOSubset_set (X:hSet) : hSet := ∑ (S:subtype_set X), WellOrdering (carrier_subset S).

Definition WOSubset (X:hSet) : UU := WOSubset_set X.

Definition WOSubset_to_subtype {X:hSet} : WOSubset X -> hsubtype X
  := pr1.

Definition WOSrel {X:hSet} (S : WOSubset X)
  : hrel (carrier_subset (WOSubset_to_subtype S))
  := pr12 S.

Definition WOStotal {X:hSet} (S : WOSubset X) : isTotalOrder (WOSrel S) := pr122 S.

Definition WOSubset_to_TOSubset {X:hSet} : WOSubset X -> TOSubset X
  := λ S, WOSubset_to_subtype S,, WOSrel S,, WOStotal S.

Coercion WOSubset_to_TOSubset : WOSubset >-> TOSubset.

Definition WOSwo {X:hSet} (S : WOSubset X) : WellOrdering (carrier_subset S) := pr2 S.

Notation "s ≤ s'" := (WOSrel _ s s') : wosubset.

Local Definition lt {X:hSet} {S : WOSubset X} (s s' : S) := ¬ (s' ≤ s)%wosubset.

Notation "s < s'" := (lt s s') : wosubset.

Definition WOS_hasSmallest {X:hSet} (S : WOSubset X) : hasSmallest (WOSrel S)
  := pr222 S.


X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
s, s': S
s < s' → s ≤ s'


X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
s, s': S
s < s' → s ≤ s'

  
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
s, s': S
¬ (s' ≤ s) → s ≤ s'

  
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
s, s': S
lt: ¬ (s' ≤ s)
s ≤ s'

  
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
s, s': S
lt: ¬ (s' ≤ s)
c: (s ≤ s')%tosubset
s ≤ s'
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
s, s': S
lt: ¬ (s' ≤ s)
c: (s' ≤ s)%tosubset
s ≤ s'

  
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
s, s': S
lt: ¬ (s' ≤ s)
c: (s ≤ s')%tosubset
s ≤ s'
 exact c.
  
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
s, s': S
lt: ¬ (s' ≤ s)
c: (s' ≤ s)%tosubset
s ≤ s'
 exact (fromempty (lt c)).
Defined.

Definition wosub_le (X:hSet) : hrel (WOSubset X)
  := (λ S T : WOSubset X, ∑ (le : S ⊆ T), tosub_order_compat le ∧ sub_initial le)%prop.


Setting T constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ ≼ _".


Definition wosub_le_inc {X:hSet} {S T : WOSubset X} : S ≼ T -> S ⊆ T := pr1.

Definition wosub_le_comp {X:hSet} {S T : WOSubset X} (le : S ≼ T) : tosub_order_compat (pr1 le)
  := pr12 le.

Definition wosub_le_subi {X:hSet} {S T : WOSubset X} (le : S ≼ T) : sub_initial (pr1 le)
  := pr22 le.


X: hSet
isrefl (wosub_le X)


X: hSet
isrefl (wosub_le X)

  
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
S ≼ S

  
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
S ⊆ S
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
(λ x : S ⊆ S,
 (λ le : S ⊆ S, tosub_order_compat le ∧ sub_initial le)
   x) ?pr1

  
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
S ⊆ S
 
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
x: X
xinS: S x
S x
 exact xinS.
  
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
(λ x : S ⊆ S,
 (λ le : S ⊆ S, tosub_order_compat le ∧ sub_initial le)
   x)
  ((λ x : X, (λ xinS : S x, xinS) : S x ⇒ S x) : S ⊆ S)
 
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
tosub_order_compat (λ (x : X) (xinS : S x), xinS)
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
sub_initial (λ (x : X) (xinS : S x), xinS)

    
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
tosub_order_compat (λ (x : X) (xinS : S x), xinS)
 
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
s, s': S
le: (s ≤ s')%tosubset
(subtype_inc (λ (x : X) (xinS : S x), xinS) s
 ≤ subtype_inc (λ (x : X) (xinS : S x), xinS) s')%tosubset
 exact le.
    
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
sub_initial (λ (x : X) (xinS : S x), xinS)
 
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
s, s': X
Ss: S s
Ss': S s'
le: (s',, Ss' ≤ s,, Ss)%tosubset
S s'
 exact Ss'.
Defined.

Definition wosub_equal {X:hSet} : hrel (WOSubset X) := λ S T, S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S.

Notation "S ≣ T" := (wosub_equal S T) (at level 70) : wosubset.

Definition wosub_comparable {X:hSet} : hrel (WOSubset X) := λ S T, S ≼ T ∨ T ≼ S.

S: WOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
LEM
⇒ hasSmallest (TOSrel (TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz))

S: WOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
lem: LEM
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset
ne: ∃ x : (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset,
T x
∃ x : (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset,
T x
∧ (∀ y : (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset,
   T y ⇒ (x ≤ y)%tosubset)

  (* T is a nonempty set.  We need to find the smallest element of it *)

T x
∧ (∀ y : (∑ y, S' y)%subset, T y ⇒ (x ≤ y)%tosubset)

  (* Decide whether [S ∩ T] is nonempty: *)
  
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
lem: LEM
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset
ne: ∃ x : (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset,
T x
S':= TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz: TOSubset X
S'z: S' z
z':= z,, S'z : S': S'
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl S z nSz: S ⊆ S'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: S → S'
SiT:= λ s : S, T (subtype_inc j s): S → hProp
q: ∃ s : S, SiT s
∃ x : (∑ y, S' y)%subset,
T x
∧ (∀ y : (∑ y, S' y)%subset, T y ⇒ (x ≤ y)%tosubset)
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
z: X

lem: LEM
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset

jmap:= subtype_inc j: S → S'
SiT:= λ s : S, T (subtype_inc j s): S → hProp
q: neg (∃ s : S, SiT s)
∃ x : (∑ y, S' y)%subset,
T x
∧ (∀ y : (∑ y, S' y)%subset, T y ⇒ (x ≤ y)%tosubset)

q: ∃ s : S, SiT s
SiTmin: ∃ x : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype S y)%subset,
SiT x
∧ (∀
   y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype S y)%subset,
   SiT y ⇒ x ≤ y)
∃ x : (∑ y, S' y)%subset,
T x
∧ (∀ y : (∑ y, S' y)%subset, T y ⇒ (x ≤ y)%tosubset)

    
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
lem: LEM
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset
ne: ∃ x : (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset,
T x
S':= TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz: TOSubset X
S'z: S' z
z':= z,, S'z : S': S'
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl S z nSz: S ⊆ S'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: S → S'
SiT:= λ s : S, T (subtype_inc j s): S → hProp
q: ∃ s : S, SiT s
m: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype S y)%subset
SiTm: SiT m
min: ∀ y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype S y)%subset,
SiT y ⇒ m ≤ y
∃ x : (∑ y, S' y)%subset,
T x
∧ (∀ y : (∑ y, S' y)%subset, T y ⇒ (x ≤ y)%tosubset)

z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
lem: LEM
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset
ne: ∃ x : (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset,
T x

z':= z,, S'z : S': S'
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl S z nSz: S ⊆ S'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: S → S'
SiT:= λ s : S, T (subtype_inc j s): S → hProp
q: ∃ s : S, SiT s
m: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype S y)%subset
SiTm: SiT m
min: ∀ y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype S y)%subset,
SiT y ⇒ m ≤ y
m':= jmap m: S'
t: X
S't: S' t
Tt: T (t,, S't)
(m' ≤ t,, S't)%tosubset

      
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
lem: LEM
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset
ne: ∃ x : (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset,
T x
S':= TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz: TOSubset X
S'z: S' z
z':= z,, S'z : S': S'
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl S z nSz: S ⊆ S'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: S → S'
SiT:= λ s : S, T (subtype_inc j s): S → hProp
q: ∃ s : S, SiT s
m: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype S y)%subset
SiTm: SiT m
min: ∀ y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype S y)%subset,
SiT y ⇒ m ≤ y
m':= jmap m: S'
t: X
S't: S' t
Tt: T (t,, S't)
St: S t
(m' ≤ t,, S't)%tosubset

z':= z,, S'z : S': S'
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl S z nSz: S ⊆ S'

q: ∃ s : S, SiT s

SiTm: SiT m
min: ∀ y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype S y)%subset,
SiT y ⇒ m ≤ y
m':= jmap m: S'
t: X
S't: S' t
Tt: T (t,, S't)
etz: (z = t)%type

X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
lem: LEM
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset
ne: ∃ x : (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset,
T x
S':= TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz: TOSubset X
S'z: S' z
z':= z,, S'z : S': S'
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl S z nSz: S ⊆ S'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: S → S'
SiT:= λ s : S, T (subtype_inc j s): S → hProp
q: ∃ s : S, SiT s
m: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype S y)%subset
SiTm: SiT m
min: ∀ y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype S y)%subset,
SiT y ⇒ m ≤ y
m':= jmap m: S'

X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
lem: LEM
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset
ne: ∃ x : (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset,
T x
S':= TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz: TOSubset X
S'z: S' z
z':= z,, S'z : S': S'
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl S z nSz: S ⊆ S'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: S → S'
SiT:= λ s : S, T (subtype_inc j s): S → hProp
q: ∃ s : S, SiT s
m: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype S y)%subset
SiTm: SiT m
min: ∀ y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype S y)%subset,
SiT y ⇒ m ≤ y
m':= jmap m: S'
t: X
St: S t
Tt: T (t,, hinhpr (inl St))
m ≤ t,, St
 exact (min (t,,St) Tt).
      
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
lem: LEM
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset
ne: ∃ x : (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset,
T x
S':= TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz: TOSubset X
S'z: S' z
z':= z,, S'z : S': S'
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl S z nSz: S ⊆ S'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: S → S'
SiT:= λ s : S, T (subtype_inc j s): S → hProp
q: ∃ s : S, SiT s
m: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype S y)%subset
SiTm: SiT m
min: ∀ y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype S y)%subset,
SiT y ⇒ m ≤ y
m':= jmap m: S'
t: X
S't: S' t
Tt: T (t,, S't)
etz: (z = t)%type
(m' ≤ t,, S't)%tosubset
 
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
lem: LEM
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset
ne: ∃ x : (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset,
T x
S':= TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz: TOSubset X
S'z: S' z
z':= z,, S'z : S': S'
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl S z nSz: S ⊆ S'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: S → S'
SiT:= λ s : S, T (subtype_inc j s): S → hProp
q: ∃ s : S, SiT s
m: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype S y)%subset
SiTm: SiT m
min: ∀ y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype S y)%subset,
SiT y ⇒ m ≤ y
m':= jmap m: S'
Tt: T (z,, hinhpr (inr (idpath z)))
unit

        exact tt.
  
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
lem: LEM
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset
ne: ∃ x : (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset,
T x
S':= TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz: TOSubset X
S'z: S' z
z':= z,, S'z : S': S'
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl S z nSz: S ⊆ S'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: S → S'
SiT:= λ s : S, T (subtype_inc j s): S → hProp
q: neg (∃ s : S, SiT s)
∃ x : (∑ y, S' y)%subset,
T x
∧ (∀ y : (∑ y, S' y)%subset, T y ⇒ (x ≤ y)%tosubset)

jmap:= subtype_inc j: S → S'
SiT:= λ s : S, T (subtype_inc j s): S → hProp
q: neg (∃ s : S, SiT s)
(∑ x : (∑ y, S' y)%subset,
 T x
 ∧ (∀ y : (∑ y, S' y)%subset, T y ⇒ (x ≤ y)%tosubset))%type

  (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset
ne: ∃ x : (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset,
T x
S':= TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz: TOSubset X
S'z: S' z
z':= z,, S'z : S': S'
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl S z nSz: S ⊆ S'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: S → S'
SiT:= λ s : S, T (subtype_inc j s): S → hProp
q: neg (∃ s : S, SiT s)
t: X
S't: S' t
Tt: T (t,, S't)
ezt: (z = t)%type
(z' ≤ t,, S't)%tosubset

      
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
lem: LEM
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset
ne: ∃ x : (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset,
T x

S'z: S' z
z':= z,, S'z : S': S'
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl S z nSz: S ⊆ S'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: S → S'
SiT:= λ s : S, T (subtype_inc j s): S → hProp
q: neg (∃ s : S, SiT s)
t: X
S't: S' t
Tt: T (t,, S't)
St: S t
(z' ≤ t,, S't)%tosubset

        (* t is in S ∩ T, but that's empty *)

  (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset

q: neg (∃ s : S, SiT s)
S't: S' z

(z' ≤ z,, S't)%tosubset

        (* now show [z ≤ z], by reflexivity *)

S: WOSubset X

nSz: ¬ S z

  (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset

T x

X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
z: X
nSz: ¬ S z
lem: LEM
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset
ne: ∃ x : (∑ y, TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz y)%subset,
T x
S':= TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz: TOSubset X
S'z: S' z
z':= z,, S'z : S': S'
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl S z nSz: S ⊆ S'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: S → S'
SiT:= λ s : S, T (subtype_inc j s): S → hProp
q: neg (∃ s : S, SiT s)
Tt: T (z,, S'z)
(z,, S'z ≤ z,, S'z)%tosubset

        exact (TOrefl S' _).
Defined.

Definition WOSubset_plus_point {X:hSet}
           (S:WOSubset X) (z:X) (nSz : ¬ S z) : LEM -> WOSubset X
  := λ lem, subtype_plus S z,,
            TOSrel (TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz),,
            TOtotal (TOSubset_plus_point S z nSz),,
            hasSmallest_WOSubset_plus_point S z nSz lem.

S = T ≃ S ╝ T
 apply total2_paths_equiv.
    
X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
S ╝ T ≃ (S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S)
 
X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
S ╝ T ≃ (∑ _ : S ≡ T, S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S)%prop
X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
(∑ _ : S ≡ T, S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S)%prop ≃ (S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S)

      
X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
S ╝ T ≃ (∑ _ : S ≡ T, S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S)%prop
 
X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
pr1 S = pr1 T ≃ S ≡ T
X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
(∏ x : pr1 S = pr1 T,
 transportf
   (λ x0 : subtype_set X,
    WellOrdering (∑ y, x0 y)%subset) x (pr2 S) = pr2 T
 ≃ (S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S))%type

        
X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
pr1 S = pr1 T ≃ S ≡ T
 apply hsubtype_univalence.
        
X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
(∏ x : pr1 S = pr1 T,
 transportf
   (λ x0 : subtype_set X,
    WellOrdering (∑ y, x0 y)%subset) x (pr2 S) = pr2 T
 ≃ (S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S))%type
 
X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
p: (pr1 S = pr1 T)%type
transportf
  (λ x : subtype_set X, WellOrdering (∑ y, x y)%subset)
  p (pr2 S) = pr2 T ≃ (S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S)
 
X: hSet
S: subtype_set X
v: WellOrdering (∑ y, S y)%subset
T: subtype_set X
w: WellOrdering (∑ y, T y)%subset
p: (pr1 (S,, v) = pr1 (T,, w))%type
transportf
  (λ x : subtype_set X, WellOrdering (∑ y, x y)%subset)
  p (pr2 (S,, v)) = pr2 (T,, w)
≃ (S,, v ≼ T,, w ∧ T,, w ≼ S,, v)
 
X: hSet
S: subtype_set X
v: WellOrdering (∑ y, S y)%subset
T: subtype_set X
w: WellOrdering (∑ y, T y)%subset
p: (S = T)%type
transportf
  (λ x : subtype_set X, WellOrdering (∑ y, x y)%subset)
  p (pr2 (S,, v)) = pr2 (T,, w)
≃ (S,, v ≼ T,, w ∧ T,, w ≼ S,, v)
 
X: hSet
S: subtype_set X
v, w: WellOrdering (∑ y, S y)%subset
transportf
  (λ x : subtype_set X, WellOrdering (∑ y, x y)%subset)
  (idpath S) (pr2 (S,, v)) = pr2 (S,, w)
≃ (S,, v ≼ S,, w ∧ S,, w ≼ S,, v)

          
X: hSet
S: subtype_set X
v, w: WellOrdering (∑ y, S y)%subset
v = w ≃ (S,, v ≼ S,, w ∧ S,, w ≼ S,, v)

          
X: hSet
S: subtype_set X
v: hrel_set (∑ y, S y)%subset
i: hProp_to_hSet (isWellOrder v)
w: hrel_set (∑ y, S y)%subset
j: hProp_to_hSet (isWellOrder w)
v,, i = w,, j
≃ (S,, v,, i ≼ S,, w,, j ∧ S,, w,, j ≼ S,, v,, i)

          
X: hSet
S: subtype_set X
v: hrel_set (∑ y, S y)%subset
i: hProp_to_hSet (isWellOrder v)
w: hrel_set (∑ y, S y)%subset
j: hProp_to_hSet (isWellOrder w)
v,, i = w,, j ≃ v = w

j: hProp_to_hSet (isWellOrder w)
v = w
≃ (S,, v,, i ≼ S,, w,, j ∧ S,, w,, j ≼ S,, v,, i)

isaprop (isWellOrder R)

 exact (idfun _).

  ((λ s : X, idfun (S s)) : S,, v,, i ⊆ S,, v,, j)

i, j: hProp_to_hSet (isWellOrder v)
s, s': S,, v,, i
le: (s ≤ s')%tosubset
(subtype_inc (λ s : X, idfun (S s)) s
 ≤ subtype_inc (λ s : X, idfun (S s)) s')%tosubset
 exact le. 
X: hSet
S: subtype_set X
v: hrel_set (∑ y, S y)%subset
i, j: hProp_to_hSet (isWellOrder v)
sub_initial (λ s : X, idfun (S s))

s, t: X
Ss: (S,, v,, i) s
St: (S,, v,, j) t
le: (t,, St ≤ s,, idfun (S s) Ss)%tosubset
(S,, v,, i) t
 exact St. } }

v: hrel_set (∑ y, S y)%subset

w: hrel_set (∑ y, S y)%subset

S,, v,, i ≼ S,, w,, j ∧ S,, w,, j ≼ S,, v,, i → v = w

w: hrel_set (∑ y, S y)%subset
j: hProp_to_hSet (isWellOrder w)
(∑ x : ∏ x : X, S x → S x,
 (∏ x0 x1 : S,
  (x0 ≤ x1)%tosubset
  → (subtype_inc x x0 ≤ subtype_inc x x1)%tosubset)
 × (∏ (x0 x1 : X) (x2 : S x0) (x3 : S x1),
    (x1,, x3 ≤ x0,, x x0 x2)%tosubset → S x1))%type
× (∑ x : ∏ x : X, S x → S x,
   (∏ x0 x1 : S,
    (x0 ≤ x1)%tosubset
    → (subtype_inc x x0 ≤ subtype_inc x x1)%tosubset)
   × (∏ (x0 x1 : X) (x2 : S x0) (x3 : S x1),
      (x1,, x3 ≤ x0,, x x0 x2)%tosubset → S x1))%type
→ v = w

e: (∏ x x0 : S,
 (x ≤ x0)%tosubset
 → (subtype_inc d x ≤ subtype_inc d x0)%tosubset)%type
triv: (∏ (f : ∏ x : X, S x → S x)
 (x : (∑ y, S y)%subset), 
 subtype_inc f x = x)%type
s, t: (∑ x : X, S x)%type
w s t → v s t

S: subtype_set X
v: hrel_set (∑ y, S y)%subset
i: hProp_to_hSet (isWellOrder v)
w: hrel_set (∑ y, S y)%subset
j: hProp_to_hSet (isWellOrder w)

 → (subtype_inc a x ≤ subtype_inc a x0)%tosubset)%type

e: (∏ x x0 : S,

 → (subtype_inc d x ≤ subtype_inc d x0)%tosubset)%type
triv: (∏ (f : ∏ x : X, S x → S x)
 (x : (∑ y, S y)%subset), 
 subtype_inc f x = x)%type
s, t: (∑ x : X, S x)%type
le: w s t
v s t

 → (subtype_inc d x ≤ subtype_inc d x0)%tosubset)%type

X: hSet
S: subtype_set X
v: hrel_set (∑ y, S y)%subset
i: hProp_to_hSet (isWellOrder v)
w: hrel_set (∑ y, S y)%subset
j: hProp_to_hSet (isWellOrder w)

b: (∏ x x0 : S,
 (x ≤ x0)%tosubset
 → (subtype_inc a x ≤ subtype_inc a x0)%tosubset)%type
d: (∏ x : X, S x → S x)%type
e: (∏ x x0 : S,
 (x ≤ x0)%tosubset
 → (subtype_inc d x ≤ subtype_inc d x0)%tosubset)%type
triv: (∏ (f : ∏ x : X, S x → S x)
 (x : (∑ y, S y)%subset), 
 subtype_inc f x = x)%type
s, t: (∑ x : X, S x)%type
le: w s t
q: (s ≤ t)%tosubset
v s t
 exact q. } 
X: hSet
S: subtype_set X
v: hrel_set (∑ y, S y)%subset
i: hProp_to_hSet (isWellOrder v)
w: hrel_set (∑ y, S y)%subset

isaprop (v = w)%type
X: hSet
S: subtype_set X
v: hrel_set (∑ y, S y)%subset
i: hProp_to_hSet (isWellOrder v)
w: hrel_set (∑ y, S y)%subset

  (S,, v,, i ≼ S,, w,, j ∧ S,, w,, j ≼ S,, v,, i)

X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
S = T → S ≣ T
X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
((weqimplimpl
    (λ k : (∑ _ : S ≡ T, S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S)%prop,
     (let X0 := pr2 k in let X1 := pr1 X0 in X1),,
     (let X0 := pr2 k in let X1 := pr2 X0 in X1))
    (λ c : S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S,
     ((λ x : X,
       wosub_le_inc (pr1 c) x,, wosub_le_inc (pr2 c) x)
      :
      S ≡ T),, c)
    (propproperty (∑ _ : S ≡ T, S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S)%prop)
    (propproperty (S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S))
  ∘ weqbandf (hsubtype_univalence S T)
      (λ x : pr1 S = pr1 T,
       (transportf
          (λ x0 : subtype_set X,
           WellOrdering (∑ y, x0 y)%subset) x (pr2 S) =
        pr2 T)%type) (λ _ : S ≡ T, S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S)
      (λ p : pr1 S = pr1 T,
       (λ (S : subtype_set X)
        (v : WellOrdering (∑ y, S y)%subset)
        (p0 : pr1 (S,, v) = pr1 T),
        (λ (T : subtype_set X)
         (w : WellOrdering (∑ y, T y)%subset)
         (p1 : pr1 (S,, v) = pr1 (T,, w)),
         paths_rect (hsubtype X) S
           (λ (T0 : hsubtype X) (p2 : S = T0),
            (∏ w0 : WellOrdering (∑ y, T0 y)%subset,
             transportf
               (λ x : subtype_set X,
                WellOrdering (...)%subset) p2
               (pr2 (S,, v)) = pr2 (T0,, w0)
             ≃ (S,, v ≼ T0,, w0 ∧ T0,, w0 ≼ S,, v))%type)
           (λ w0 : WellOrdering (∑ y, S y)%subset,
            (λ (v0 : hrel_set (∑ y, S y)%subset)
             (i : hProp_to_hSet (isWellOrder v0)),
             (λ (w1 : hrel_set (...)%subset)
              (j : hProp_to_hSet (...)),
              weqimplimpl (...) (...) (...) (...)
              ∘ subtypeInjectivity (...) (...) (...)
                  (...)) (pr1 w0) (pr2 w0)) (pr1 v)
              (pr2 v)) T p1 w) (pr1 T) (pr2 T) p0)
         (pr1 S) (pr2 S) p)
  ∘ total2_paths_equiv
      (λ x : subtype_set X,
       WellOrdering (∑ y, x y)%subset) S T)%weq
 :
 S = T ≃ S ≣ T) ~ ?g

  
X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
S = T → S ≣ T
 apply wosub_univalence_map. 
X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
((weqimplimpl
    (λ k : (∑ _ : S ≡ T, S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S)%prop,
     (let X0 := pr2 k in let X1 := pr1 X0 in X1),,
     (let X0 := pr2 k in let X1 := pr2 X0 in X1))
    (λ c : S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S,
     ((λ x : X,
       wosub_le_inc (pr1 c) x,, wosub_le_inc (pr2 c) x)
      :
      S ≡ T),, c)
    (propproperty (∑ _ : S ≡ T, S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S)%prop)
    (propproperty (S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S))
  ∘ weqbandf (hsubtype_univalence S T)
      (λ x : pr1 S = pr1 T,
       (transportf
          (λ x0 : subtype_set X,
           WellOrdering (∑ y, x0 y)%subset) x (pr2 S) =
        pr2 T)%type) (λ _ : S ≡ T, S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S)
      (λ p : pr1 S = pr1 T,
       (λ (S : subtype_set X)
        (v : WellOrdering (∑ y, S y)%subset)
        (p0 : pr1 (S,, v) = pr1 T),
        (λ (T : subtype_set X)
         (w : WellOrdering (∑ y, T y)%subset)
         (p1 : pr1 (S,, v) = pr1 (T,, w)),
         paths_rect (hsubtype X) S
           (λ (T0 : hsubtype X) (p2 : S = T0),
            (∏ w0 : WellOrdering (∑ y, T0 y)%subset,
             transportf
               (λ x : subtype_set X,
                WellOrdering (...)%subset) p2
               (pr2 (S,, v)) = pr2 (T0,, w0)
             ≃ (S,, v ≼ T0,, w0 ∧ T0,, w0 ≼ S,, v))%type)
           (λ w0 : WellOrdering (∑ y, S y)%subset,
            (λ (v0 : hrel_set (∑ y, S y)%subset)
             (i : hProp_to_hSet (isWellOrder v0)),
             (λ (w1 : hrel_set (...)%subset)
              (j : hProp_to_hSet (...)),
              weqimplimpl (...) (...) (...) (...)
              ∘ subtypeInjectivity (...) (...) (...)
                  (...)) (pr1 w0) (pr2 w0)) (pr1 v)
              (pr2 v)) T p1 w) (pr1 T) (pr2 T) p0)
         (pr1 S) (pr2 S) p)
  ∘ total2_paths_equiv
      (λ x : subtype_set X,
       WellOrdering (∑ y, x y)%subset) S T)%weq
 :
 S = T ≃ S ≣ T) ~ wosub_univalence_map S T

  
X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
((weqimplimpl
    (λ k : (∑ _ : S ≡ T, S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S)%prop,
     (let X0 := pr2 k in let X1 := pr1 X0 in X1),,
     (let X0 := pr2 k in let X1 := pr2 X0 in X1))
    (λ c : S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S,
     ((λ x : X,
       wosub_le_inc (pr1 c) x,, wosub_le_inc (pr2 c) x)
      :
      S ≡ T),, c)
    (propproperty (∑ _ : S ≡ T, S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S)%prop)
    (propproperty (S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S))
  ∘ weqbandf (hsubtype_univalence S T)
      (λ x : pr1 S = pr1 T,
       (transportf
          (λ x0 : subtype_set X,
           WellOrdering (∑ y, x0 y)%subset) x (pr2 S) =
        pr2 T)%type) (λ _ : S ≡ T, S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S)
      (λ p : pr1 S = pr1 T,
       (λ (S : subtype_set X)
        (v : WellOrdering (∑ y, S y)%subset)
        (p0 : pr1 (S,, v) = pr1 T),
        (λ (T : subtype_set X)
         (w : WellOrdering (∑ y, T y)%subset)
         (p1 : pr1 (S,, v) = pr1 (T,, w)),
         paths_rect (hsubtype X) S
           (λ (T0 : hsubtype X) (p2 : S = T0),
            (∏ w0 : WellOrdering (∑ y, T0 y)%subset,
             transportf
               (λ x : subtype_set X,
                WellOrdering (...)%subset) p2
               (pr2 (S,, v)) = pr2 (T0,, w0)
             ≃ (S,, v ≼ T0,, w0 ∧ T0,, w0 ≼ S,, v))%type)
           (λ w0 : WellOrdering (∑ y, S y)%subset,
            (λ (v0 : hrel_set (∑ y, S y)%subset)
             (i : hProp_to_hSet (isWellOrder v0)),
             (λ (w1 : hrel_set (...)%subset)
              (j : hProp_to_hSet (...)),
              weqimplimpl (...) (...) (...) (...)
              ∘ subtypeInjectivity (...) (...) (...)
                  (...)) (pr1 w0) (pr2 w0)) (pr1 v)
              (pr2 v)) T p1 w) (pr1 T) (pr2 T) p0)
         (pr1 S) (pr2 S) p)
  ∘ total2_paths_equiv
      (λ x : subtype_set X,
       WellOrdering (∑ y, x y)%subset) S T)%weq
 :
 S = T ≃ S ≣ T) ~ wosub_univalence_map S T
 
X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
e: (S = T)%type
((weqimplimpl
    (λ k : (∑ _ : S ≡ T, S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S)%prop,
     (let X0 := pr2 k in let X1 := pr1 X0 in X1),,
     (let X0 := pr2 k in let X1 := pr2 X0 in X1))
    (λ c : S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S,
     (λ x : X,
      wosub_le_inc (pr1 c) x,, wosub_le_inc (pr2 c) x),,
     c)
    (propproperty (∑ _ : S ≡ T, S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S)%prop)
    (propproperty (S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S))
  ∘ weqbandf (hsubtype_univalence S T)
      (λ x : pr1 S = pr1 T,
       transportf
         (λ x0 : subtype_set X,
          WellOrdering (∑ y, x0 y)%subset) x (pr2 S) =
       pr2 T) (λ _ : S ≡ T, S ≼ T ∧ T ≼ S)
      (λ p : pr1 S = pr1 T,
       paths_rect (hsubtype X) (pr1 S)
         (λ (T : hsubtype X) (p0 : pr1 S = T),
          ∏ w : WellOrdering (∑ y, T y)%subset,
          transportf
            (λ x : subtype_set X,
             WellOrdering (∑ y, x y)%subset) p0
            (pr2 (pr1 S,, pr2 S)) = pr2 (T,, w)
          ≃ (pr1 S,, pr2 S ≼ T,, w
             ∧ T,, w ≼ pr1 S,, pr2 S))
         (λ w : WellOrdering (∑ y, pr1 S y)%subset,
          weqimplimpl
            (λ p0 : pr12 S = pr1 w,
             paths_rect
               (hrel_set (∑ y, pr1 S y)%subset)
               (pr12 S)
               (λ (w0 : hrel_set (∑ y, pr1 S y)%subset)
                (_ : pr12 S = w0),
                ∏ j : hProp_to_hSet (isWellOrder w0),
                pr1 S,, pr12 S,, pr22 S
                ≼ pr1 S,, w0,, j
                ∧ pr1 S,, w0,, j
                  ≼ pr1 S,, pr12 S,, pr22 S)
               (λ j : hProp_to_hSet
                        (isWellOrder (pr12 S)),
                ((λ s : X, idfun (pr1 S s)),,
                 (λ (s s' : ...,, ...)
                  (le : (...)%tosubset), le),,
                 (λ (s t : X) (Ss : ... s)
                  (St : ... t) (_ : (...)%tosubset),
                  St)),,
                (λ s : X, idfun (pr1 S s)),,
                (λ (s s' : pr1 S,, pr12 S,, j)
                 (le : (s ≤ s')%tosubset), le),,
                (λ (s t : X) (Ss : (...) s)
                 (St : (...) t)
                 (_ : (... ≤ ...)%tosubset), St))
               (pr1 w) p0 (pr2 w))
            (λ X0 : (∑ x : ∏ x : X, pr1 S x → pr1 S x,
                     (∏ x0 x1 : pr1 S,
                      (x0 ≤ x1)%tosubset
                      → (subtype_inc x x0
                         ≤ subtype_inc x x1)%tosubset)
                     × (∏ (x0 x1 : X) (x2 : pr1 S x0)
                        (x3 : pr1 S x1),
                        (x1,, x3 ≤ x0,, ...)%tosubset
                        → pr1 S x1))
                    × (∑
                       x : ∏ x : X, pr1 S x → pr1 S x,
                       (∏ x0 x1 : pr1 S,
                        (x0 ≤ x1)%tosubset
                        → (subtype_inc x x0
                           ≤ subtype_inc x x1)%tosubset)
                       × (∏ (x0 x1 : X)
                          (x2 : pr1 S x0)
                          (x3 : pr1 S x1),
                          (x1,, x3 ≤ x0,, ...)%tosubset
                          → pr1 S x1)),
             let triv :=
               λ (f : ∏ x : X, pr1 S x → pr1 S x)
               (s : (∑ y, pr1 S y)%subset),
               subtypePath_prop (idpath (pr1 s)) in
             funextfun (pr12 S) (pr1 w)
               (λ s : ∑ x : X, pr1 S x,
                funextfun ((pr12 S) s) (pr1 w s)
                  (λ t : ∑ x : X, pr1 S x,
                   hPropUnivalence ((pr12 S) s t)
                     (pr1 w s t) (λ le : ..., ... ...)
                     (λ le : ..., ... ...))))
            (setproperty
               (hrel_set (∑ y, pr1 S y)%subset)
               (pr12 S) (pr1 w))
            (propproperty
               (pr1 S,, pr12 S,, pr22 S
                ≼ pr1 S,, pr1 w,, pr2 w
                ∧ pr1 S,, pr1 w,, pr2 w
                  ≼ pr1 S,, pr12 S,, pr22 S))
          ∘ subtypeInjectivity
              (λ x : hrel_set (∑ y, pr1 S y)%subset,
               hProp_to_hSet (isWellOrder x))
              (λ R : hrel (∑ y, pr1 S y)%subset,
               propproperty (isWellOrder R))
              (pr12 S,, pr22 S) (pr1 w,, pr2 w))
         (pr1 T) p (pr2 T))
  ∘ total2_paths_equiv
      (λ x : subtype_set X,
       WellOrdering (∑ y, x y)%subset) S T)%weq e =
 wosub_univalence_map S T e)%type
 
X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
((weqimplimpl
    (λ k : (∑ _ : S ≡ S, S ≼ S ∧ S ≼ S)%prop,
     (let X0 := pr2 k in let X1 := pr1 X0 in X1),,
     (let X0 := pr2 k in let X1 := pr2 X0 in X1))
    (λ c : S ≼ S ∧ S ≼ S,
     (λ x : X,
      wosub_le_inc (pr1 c) x,, wosub_le_inc (pr2 c) x),,
     c)
    (propproperty (∑ _ : S ≡ S, S ≼ S ∧ S ≼ S)%prop)
    (propproperty (S ≼ S ∧ S ≼ S))
  ∘ weqbandf (hsubtype_univalence S S)
      (λ x : pr1 S = pr1 S,
       transportf
         (λ x0 : subtype_set X,
          WellOrdering (∑ y, x0 y)%subset) x (pr2 S) =
       pr2 S) (λ _ : S ≡ S, S ≼ S ∧ S ≼ S)
      (λ p : pr1 S = pr1 S,
       paths_rect (hsubtype X) (pr1 S)
         (λ (T : hsubtype X) (p0 : pr1 S = T),
          ∏ w : WellOrdering (∑ y, T y)%subset,
          transportf
            (λ x : subtype_set X,
             WellOrdering (∑ y, x y)%subset) p0
            (pr2 (pr1 S,, pr2 S)) = pr2 (T,, w)
          ≃ (pr1 S,, pr2 S ≼ T,, w
             ∧ T,, w ≼ pr1 S,, pr2 S))
         (λ w : WellOrdering (∑ y, pr1 S y)%subset,
          weqimplimpl
            (λ p0 : pr12 S = pr1 w,
             paths_rect
               (hrel_set (∑ y, pr1 S y)%subset)
               (pr12 S)
               (λ (w0 : hrel_set (∑ y, pr1 S y)%subset)
                (_ : pr12 S = w0),
                ∏ j : hProp_to_hSet (isWellOrder w0),
                pr1 S,, pr12 S,, pr22 S
                ≼ pr1 S,, w0,, j
                ∧ pr1 S,, w0,, j
                  ≼ pr1 S,, pr12 S,, pr22 S)
               (λ j : hProp_to_hSet
                        (isWellOrder (pr12 S)),
                ((λ s : X, idfun (pr1 S s)),,
                 (λ (s s' : ...,, ...)
                  (le : (...)%tosubset), le),,
                 (λ (s t : X) (Ss : ... s)
                  (St : ... t) (_ : (...)%tosubset),
                  St)),,
                (λ s : X, idfun (pr1 S s)),,
                (λ (s s' : pr1 S,, pr12 S,, j)
                 (le : (s ≤ s')%tosubset), le),,
                (λ (s t : X) (Ss : (...) s)
                 (St : (...) t)
                 (_ : (... ≤ ...)%tosubset), St))
               (pr1 w) p0 (pr2 w))
            (λ X0 : (∑ x : ∏ x : X, pr1 S x → pr1 S x,
                     (∏ x0 x1 : pr1 S,
                      (x0 ≤ x1)%tosubset
                      → (subtype_inc x x0
                         ≤ subtype_inc x x1)%tosubset)
                     × (∏ (x0 x1 : X) (x2 : pr1 S x0)
                        (x3 : pr1 S x1),
                        (x1,, x3 ≤ x0,, ...)%tosubset
                        → pr1 S x1))
                    × (∑
                       x : ∏ x : X, pr1 S x → pr1 S x,
                       (∏ x0 x1 : pr1 S,
                        (x0 ≤ x1)%tosubset
                        → (subtype_inc x x0
                           ≤ subtype_inc x x1)%tosubset)
                       × (∏ (x0 x1 : X)
                          (x2 : pr1 S x0)
                          (x3 : pr1 S x1),
                          (x1,, x3 ≤ x0,, ...)%tosubset
                          → pr1 S x1)),
             let triv :=
               λ (f : ∏ x : X, pr1 S x → pr1 S x)
               (s : (∑ y, pr1 S y)%subset),
               subtypePath_prop (idpath (pr1 s)) in
             funextfun (pr12 S) (pr1 w)
               (λ s : ∑ x : X, pr1 S x,
                funextfun ((pr12 S) s) (pr1 w s)
                  (λ t : ∑ x : X, pr1 S x,
                   hPropUnivalence ((pr12 S) s t)
                     (pr1 w s t) (λ le : ..., ... ...)
                     (λ le : ..., ... ...))))
            (setproperty
               (hrel_set (∑ y, pr1 S y)%subset)
               (pr12 S) (pr1 w))
            (propproperty
               (pr1 S,, pr12 S,, pr22 S
                ≼ pr1 S,, pr1 w,, pr2 w
                ∧ pr1 S,, pr1 w,, pr2 w
                  ≼ pr1 S,, pr12 S,, pr22 S))
          ∘ subtypeInjectivity
              (λ x : hrel_set (∑ y, pr1 S y)%subset,
               hProp_to_hSet (isWellOrder x))
              (λ R : hrel (∑ y, pr1 S y)%subset,
               propproperty (isWellOrder R))
              (pr12 S,, pr22 S) (pr1 w,, pr2 w))
         (pr1 S) p (pr2 S))
  ∘ total2_paths_equiv
      (λ x : subtype_set X,
       WellOrdering (∑ y, x y)%subset) S S)%weq
   (idpath S) = wosub_univalence_map S S (idpath S))%type
 reflexivity. }
Defined.


X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
e: (S = T)%type
(wosub_univalence S T e = wosub_univalence_map S T e)%type


X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
e: (S = T)%type
(wosub_univalence S T e = wosub_univalence_map S T e)%type

  reflexivity.
Defined.


X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
S ≼ T → S → T


X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
S ≼ T → S → T

  
X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
le: S ≼ T
s: S
T
 exact (subtype_inc (pr1 le) s).
Defined.


X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
le: S ≼ T
s, s': S
s ≤ s' ⇔ wosub_inc le s ≤ wosub_inc le s'

(* we want this lemma available after showing the union of a chain is totally ordered
   but before showing it has the smallest element condition *)

S, T: WOSubset X
le: S ≼ T
s, s': S
s ≤ s' ⇔ wosub_inc le s ≤ wosub_inc le s'

le: S ≼ T

istotal Srel
 apply (WOSwo S).

X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
le: S ⊆ T
com: tosub_order_compat le
ini: sub_initial le
s, s': S
Srel:= WOSrel S: hrel (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype S y)%subset
Stot: istotal Srel
Trel:= WOSrel T: hrel (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset
Tanti: isantisymm Trel
l: Trel (wosub_inc (le,, com,, ini) s)
  (wosub_inc (le,, com,, ini) s')
c: s' ≤ s
s ≤ s'

      
X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
le: S ⊆ T
com: tosub_order_compat le
ini: sub_initial le
s, s': S
Srel:= WOSrel S: hrel (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype S y)%subset
Stot: istotal Srel
Trel:= WOSrel T: hrel (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset
Tanti: isantisymm Trel
l: Trel (wosub_inc (le,, com,, ini) s)
  (wosub_inc (le,, com,, ini) s')
c: s' ≤ s
k: (subtype_inc le s' ≤ subtype_inc le s)%tosubset
s ≤ s'

(s = s')%type

k': (wosub_inc (le,, com,, ini) s =
 wosub_inc (le,, com,, ini) s')%type
(pr1 s = pr1 s')%type
 exact (maponpaths pr1 k').

X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
le: S ⊆ T
com: tosub_order_compat le
ini: sub_initial le
s: S
Srel:= WOSrel S: hrel (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype S y)%subset
Stot: istotal Srel
Trel:= WOSrel T: hrel (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset
Tanti: isantisymm Trel
l: Trel (wosub_inc (le,, com,, ini) s)
  (wosub_inc (le,, com,, ini) s)
c: s ≤ s
k': (wosub_inc (le,, com,, ini) s =
 wosub_inc (le,, com,, ini) s)%type
s ≤ s
 apply (pr2 S). (* refl *) }
Defined.


X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
s, t, u: S
s = t → t ≤ u → s ≤ u


X: hSet
S: WOSubset X
s, t, u: S
s = t → t ≤ u → s ≤ u

S: WOSubset X
s, t, u: S
p: (s = t)%type
le: t ≤ u
s ≤ u

S: WOSubset X
s, u: S
le: s ≤ u
s ≤ u
 exact le.
Defined.


X: hSet
isPartialOrder (wosub_le X)

istrans (wosub_le X)

istrans (wosub_le X)
 
X: hSet
S, T, U: WOSubset X
i: S ≼ T
j: T ≼ U
S ≼ U

    
X: hSet
S, T, U: WOSubset X
i: S ≼ T
j: T ≼ U
tosub_order_compat
  ((pr11 (subtype_containment_isPartialOrder X)) S T U
     (pr1 i) (pr1 j))
∧ sub_initial
    ((pr11 (subtype_containment_isPartialOrder X)) S T
       U (pr1 i) (pr1 j))

    
X: hSet
S, T, U: WOSubset X
i: S ≼ T
j: T ≼ U
tosub_order_compat
  ((pr11 (subtype_containment_isPartialOrder X)) S T U
     (pr1 i) (pr1 j))
X: hSet
S, T, U: WOSubset X
i: S ≼ T
j: T ≼ U

  ((pr11 (subtype_containment_isPartialOrder X)) S T U
     (pr1 i) (pr1 j))

    
X: hSet
S, T, U: WOSubset X
i: S ≼ T
j: T ≼ U
tosub_order_compat
  ((pr11 (subtype_containment_isPartialOrder X)) S T U
     (pr1 i) (pr1 j))
 
X: hSet
S, T, U: WOSubset X
i: S ≼ T
j: T ≼ U
s, s': S
l: (s ≤ s')%tosubset
(subtype_inc
   ((pr11 (subtype_containment_isPartialOrder X)) S T
      U (pr1 i) (pr1 j)) s
 ≤ subtype_inc
     ((pr11 (subtype_containment_isPartialOrder X)) S
        T U (pr1 i) (pr1 j)) s')%tosubset
 exact (wosub_le_comp j _ _ (wosub_le_comp i _ _ l)).
    
X: hSet
S, T, U: WOSubset X
i: S ≼ T
j: T ≼ U
sub_initial
  ((pr11 (subtype_containment_isPartialOrder X)) S T U
     (pr1 i) (pr1 j))
 
X: hSet
S, T, U: WOSubset X
i: S ≼ T
j: T ≼ U
s, u: X
Ss: S s
Uu: U u
l: (u,, Uu
 ≤ s,,
   (pr11 (subtype_containment_isPartialOrder X)) S
     T U (pr1 i) (pr1 j) s Ss)%tosubset
S u

      
X: hSet
S, T, U: WOSubset X
i: S ≼ T
j: T ≼ U
s, u: X
Ss: S s
Uu: U u
l: u,, Uu
≤ subtype_inc (pr1 j)
    (subtype_inc (pr1 i) (s,, Ss))
S u

      
X: hSet
S, T, U: WOSubset X
i: S ≼ T
j: T ≼ U
s, u: X
Ss: S s
Uu: U u
l: u,, Uu
≤ subtype_inc (pr1 j)
    (subtype_inc (pr1 i) (s,, Ss))
uinT:= u,, wosub_le_subi j s u (pr1 i s Ss) Uu l : T: T
S u

      
X: hSet
S, T, U: WOSubset X
i: S ≼ T
j: T ≼ U
s, u: X
Ss: S s
Uu: U u
l: u,, Uu
≤ subtype_inc (pr1 j)
    (subtype_inc (pr1 i) (s,, Ss))
uinT:= u,, wosub_le_subi j s u (pr1 i s Ss) Uu l : T: T
(subtype_inc (pr1 j) uinT = u,, Uu)%type
X: hSet
S, T, U: WOSubset X
i: S ≼ T
j: T ≼ U
s, u: X
Ss: S s
Uu: U u

    (subtype_inc (pr1 i) (s,, Ss))

p: (subtype_inc (pr1 j) uinT = u,, Uu)%type
S u

i: S ≼ T
j: T ≼ U
s, u: X
Ss: S s
Uu: U u
l: u,, Uu
≤ subtype_inc (pr1 j)
    (subtype_inc (pr1 i) (s,, Ss))
uinT:= u,, wosub_le_subi j s u (pr1 i s Ss) Uu l : T: T
(subtype_inc (pr1 j) uinT = u,, Uu)%type
 now apply subtypePath_prop. 
X: hSet
S, T, U: WOSubset X
i: S ≼ T
j: T ≼ U
s, u: X
Ss: S s
Uu: U u
l: u,, Uu
≤ subtype_inc (pr1 j)
    (subtype_inc (pr1 i) (s,, Ss))
uinT:= u,, wosub_le_subi j s u (pr1 i s Ss) Uu l : T: T
p: (subtype_inc (pr1 j) uinT = u,, Uu)%type
S u

q: subtype_inc (pr1 j) uinT
≤ subtype_inc (pr1 j)
    (subtype_inc (pr1 i) (s,, Ss))
S u

j: T ≼ U

isrefl (wosub_le X)
 apply wosub_le_isrefl.

i: S ≼ T
j: T ≼ S
(S = T)%type

S, T: WOSubset X
i: S ≼ T
j: T ≼ S
S ≣ T
 exact (i,,j).
Defined.


X: hSet
Poset


X: hSet
Poset

  
X: hSet
PartialOrder (WOSubset_set X)

  
X: hSet
isPartialOrder (λ S T : WOSubset X, S ≼ T)

  exact (wosub_le_isPartialOrder X).
Defined.

Definition wosub_le_smaller {X:hSet} (S T:WOSubset X) : hProp := (S ≼ T) ∧ (∃ t:T, t ∉ S).

Notation "S ≺ T" := (wosub_le_smaller S T) (at level 70) : wosubset.

(* [upto s x] means x is in S and, as an element of S, it is strictly less than s *)
Definition upto {X:hSet} {S:WOSubset X} (s:S) : hsubtype X
  := (λ x, ∑ h:S x, (x,,h) < s)%prop.


X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
x: X
Sx: S x
Tx: T x
S ≼ T → upto (x,, Sx) = upto (x,, Tx)


X: hSet
S, T: WOSubset X
x: X
Sx: S x
Tx: T x
S ≼ T → upto (x,, Sx) = upto (x,, Tx)

x: X
Sx: S x
Tx: T x
ST: S ≼ T
(upto (x,, Sx) = upto (x,, Tx))%type

U

X: hSet
S: hsubtype X
T: WOSubset X
le: S ⊆ T
lem: LEM
ini: sub_initial le
R:= WOSrel T: hrel (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset
U:= (λ t : T, ¬ (t ∈ S) : hProp) : hsubtype T: hsubtype T
minU: ∃ x : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset,
U x
∧ (∀ y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset,
   U y ⇒ x ≤ y)
∃ t : T, S ≡ upto t

  
X: hSet
S: hsubtype X
T: WOSubset X
le: S ⊆ T
lem: LEM
ini: sub_initial le
R:= WOSrel T: hrel (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset
U:= (λ t : T, ¬ (t ∈ S) : hProp) : hsubtype T: hsubtype T
u: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset
Uu: U u
minu: ∀ y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset,
U y ⇒ u ≤ y
∃ t : T, S ≡ upto t

  (* minu says that u is the smallest element of T not in S *)

Uu: U u
minu: ∀ y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset,
U y ⇒ u ≤ y
(∑ t : T, S ≡ upto t)%type

X: hSet
S: hsubtype X
T: WOSubset X
le: S ⊆ T
lem: LEM
ini: sub_initial le
R:= WOSrel T: hrel (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset

ules: u ≤ y,, le y Sy
u ∈ S

ini: sub_initial le
R:= WOSrel T: hrel (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset
U:= (λ t : T, ¬ (t ∈ S) : hProp) : hsubtype T: hsubtype T
u: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset
Uu: U u
minu: ∀ y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset,
U y ⇒ u ≤ y
y: X
yltu: upto u y
S y
 
X: hSet
S: hsubtype X
T: WOSubset X
le: S ⊆ T
lem: LEM
ini: sub_initial le
R:= WOSrel T: hrel (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset
U:= (λ t : T, ¬ (t ∈ S) : hProp) : hsubtype T: hsubtype T
u: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset
Uu: U u
minu: ∀ y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset,
U y ⇒ u ≤ y
y: X
yinT: T y
yltu: y,, yinT < u
S y

    (* Goal : [S y].  We know y is smaller than the smallest element of T not in S, *)
(*        so at best, constructively, we know [¬ ¬ (S y)].  So prove it by contradiction. *)
    
X: hSet
S: hsubtype X
T: WOSubset X
le: S ⊆ T
lem: LEM
ini: sub_initial le
R:= WOSrel T: hrel (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset
U:= (λ t : T, ¬ (t ∈ S) : hProp) : hsubtype T: hsubtype T
u: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset
Uu: U u
minu: ∀ y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset,
U y ⇒ u ≤ y
y: X
yinT: T y
yltu: y,, yinT < u
¬ ¬ S y

    
X: hSet
S: hsubtype X
T: WOSubset X
le: S ⊆ T
lem: LEM
ini: sub_initial le
R:= WOSrel T: hrel (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset
U:= (λ t : T, ¬ (t ∈ S) : hProp) : hsubtype T: hsubtype T
u: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset
Uu: U u
minu: ∀ y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset,
U y ⇒ u ≤ y
y: X
yinT: T y
yltu: y,, yinT < u
bc: ¬ S y
∅
 
X: hSet
S: hsubtype X
T: WOSubset X
le: S ⊆ T
lem: LEM
ini: sub_initial le
R:= WOSrel T: hrel (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset
U:= (λ t : T, ¬ (t ∈ S) : hProp) : hsubtype T: hsubtype T
u: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset
Uu: U u
minu: ∀ y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype T y)%subset,
U y ⇒ u ≤ y
y: X
yinT: T y
yltu: y,, yinT < u
bc: ¬ S y
u ≤ y,, yinT
 now use minu.
Defined.

(** ** The union of a chain of totally ordered subsets *)

Definition is_wosubset_chain {X : hSet} {I : UU} (S : I → WOSubset X)
  := ∀ i j : I, wosub_comparable (S i) (S j).


X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
x: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset
∃ j : I, S i ≼ S j ∧ S j (pr1 x)


X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
x: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset
∃ j : I, S i ≼ S j ∧ S j (pr1 x)

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
x: X
xinU: (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) x
∃ j : I, S i ≼ S j ∧ S j (pr1 (x,, xinU))
 
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
x: X
xinU: (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) x
k: I
xinSk: S k x
∃ j : I, S i ≼ S j ∧ S j (pr1 (x,, xinU))

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
x: X
xinU: (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) x
k: I
xinSk: S k x
∃ j : I, S i ≼ S j ∧ S j x

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
x: X
xinU: (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) x
k: I
xinSk: S k x
(S i ≼ S k) ⨿ (S k ≼ S i) → ∃ j : I, S i ≼ S j ∧ S j x
 
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
x: X
xinU: (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) x
k: I
xinSk: S k x
c: (S i ≼ S k) ⨿ (S k ≼ S i)
∃ j : I, S i ≼ S j ∧ S j x

X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset
∃ i : I, S i (pr1 x) ∧ S i (pr1 y)


X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset
∃ i : I, S i (pr1 x) ∧ S i (pr1 y)

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x: X
j: (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) x
y: X
k: (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y
∃ i : I, S i (pr1 (x,, j)) ∧ S i (pr1 (y,, k))
 
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x: X
j: (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) x
y: X

X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y, z: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset
∃ i : I, S i (pr1 x) ∧ S i (pr1 y) ∧ S i (pr1 z)


X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y, z: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset
∃ i : I, S i (pr1 x) ∧ S i (pr1 y) ∧ S i (pr1 z)

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x: X
j: (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) x
y: X
k: (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y
z: X
l: (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) z
∃ i : I,
S i (pr1 (x,, j))
∧ S i (pr1 (y,, k)) ∧ S i (pr1 (z,, l))
 
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x: X
j: (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) x
y: X
k: (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y
z: X
l: (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) z
∃ i : I, S i x ∧ S i y ∧ S i z

S: I → WOSubset X
x, y, z: X
j: I
s: S j x
k: I
t: S k y
l: I
u: S l z
c: S j ≼ S k
d: S l ≼ S k
∃ i : I, S i x ∧ S i y ∧ S i z

c: S k ≼ S j

→ ∃ i : I, S i x ∧ S i y ∧ S i z

S j z

X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: X
i, j: I
xi: S i x
xj: S j x
yi: S i y
yj: S j y
((x,, xi ≤ y,, yi) = (x,, xj ≤ y,, yj))%type


X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: X
i, j: I
xi: S i x
xj: S j x
yi: S i y
yj: S j y
((x,, xi ≤ y,, yi) = (x,, xj ≤ y,, yj))%type

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: X
i, j: I
xi: S i x
xj: S j x
yi: S i y
yj: S j y
x,, xi ≤ y,, yi ⇔ x,, xj ≤ y,, yj

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: X
i, j: I
xi: S i x
xj: S j x
yi: S i y
yj: S j y
(S i ≼ S j) ⨿ (S j ≼ S i)
→ x,, xi ≤ y,, yi ⇔ x,, xj ≤ y,, yj

yj: S j y
c: S i ≼ S j
x,, xi ≤ y,, yi ⇔ x,, xj ≤ y,, yj

I: UU

X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: X
i, j: I
xi: S i x
xj: S j x
yi: S i y
yj: S j y
c: S i ≼ S j
l: x,, xi ≤ y,, yi
x,, xj ≤ y,, yj
 
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: X
i, j: I
xi: S i x
xj: S j x
yi: S i y
yj: S j y
c: S i ≼ S j
q: (subtype_inc (pr1 c) (x,, xi)
 ≤ subtype_inc (pr1 c) (y,, yi))%tosubset
x,, xj ≤ y,, yj
 now apply (h1'' q).
    
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: X
i, j: I
xi: S i x
xj: S j x
yi: S i y
yj: S j y
c: S i ≼ S j
x,, xj ≤ y,, yj ⇒ x,, xi ≤ y,, yi
 
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: X
i, j: I
xi: S i x
xj: S j x
yi: S i y
yj: S j y
c: S i ≼ S j
l: x,, xj ≤ y,, yj
x,, xi ≤ y,, yi
 
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: X
i, j: I
xi: S i x
xj: S j x
yi: S i y
yj: S j y
c: S i ≼ S j
l: x,, xj ≤ y,, yj
wosub_inc c (x,, xi) ≤ wosub_inc c (y,, yi)

      now apply (@h1'' X (S j) _ _ _ _ l).

x, y: X
i, j: I

yj: S j y
c: S j ≼ S i
x,, xi ≤ y,, yi ⇔ x,, xj ≤ y,, yj

S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S

xi: S i x

yi: S i y
yj: S j y
c: S j ≼ S i
l: x,, xi ≤ y,, yi
wosub_inc c (x,, xj) ≤ wosub_inc c (y,, yj)

      now apply (@h1'' X (S i) _ _ _ _ l).

X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: X
i, j: I
xi: S i x
xj: S j x
yi: S i y
yj: S j y
c: S j ≼ S i
q: (subtype_inc (pr1 c) (x,, xj)
 ≤ subtype_inc (pr1 c) (y,, yj))%tosubset
x,, xi ≤ y,, yi
 now apply (h1'' q).
Defined.


X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
hrel (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset


X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
hrel (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset
hProp

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset
hPropset
 
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset
(∑ i : I, S i (pr1 x) ∧ S i (pr1 y)) → hPropset
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset
isconst ?f

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset
(∑ i : I, S i (pr1 x) ∧ S i (pr1 y)) → hPropset
 
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset
i: I
s: S i (pr1 x)
t: S i (pr1 y)
hPropset
 exact (WOSrel (S i) (pr1 x,,s) (pr1 y,,t)).
  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset
isconst
  (λ X0 : ∑ i : I, S i (pr1 x) ∧ S i (pr1 y),
   (λ (i : I) (pr2 : S i (pr1 x) ∧ S i (pr1 y)),
    (λ (s : S i (pr1 x)) (t : S i (pr1 y)),
     pr1 x,, s ≤ pr1 y,, t) (pr1 pr2)
      (Preamble.pr2 pr2)) (pr1 X0) (pr2 X0))
 
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset
i, j: (∑ i : I, S i (pr1 x) ∧ S i (pr1 y))%type
(pr1 x,, pr12 i ≤ pr1 y,, pr22 i) =
(pr1 x,, pr12 j ≤ pr1 y,, pr22 j)
 now apply chain_union_prelim_eq0.
Defined.


X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset
i: I
s: S i (pr1 x)
t: S i (pr1 y)
(chain_union_rel chain x y = (pr1 x,, s ≤ pr1 y,, t))%type


X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset
i: I
s: S i (pr1 x)
t: S i (pr1 y)
(chain_union_rel chain x y = (pr1 x,, s ≤ pr1 y,, t))%type

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset
i: I
s: S i (pr1 x)
t: S i (pr1 y)
(squash_to_hSet
   (λ X0 : ∑ i : I, S i (pr1 x) ∧ S i (pr1 y),
    pr1 x,, pr12 X0 ≤ pr1 y,, pr22 X0)
   (λ (i : ∑ i : I, S i (pr1 x) ∧ S i (pr1 y))
    (j : ∑ i0 : I, S i0 (pr1 x) ∧ S i0 (pr1 y)),
    chain_union_prelim_eq0 chain (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
      (pr1 i) (pr1 j) (pr12 i) (pr12 j) (pr22 i)
      (pr22 j)) (common_index2 chain x y) =
 (pr1 x,, s ≤ pr1 y,, t))%type
 
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset
i: I
s: S i (pr1 x)
t: S i (pr1 y)
h: ∃ i : I, S i (pr1 x) ∧ S i (pr1 y)
(squash_to_hSet
   (λ X0 : ∑ i : I, S i (pr1 x) ∧ S i (pr1 y),
    pr1 x,, pr12 X0 ≤ pr1 y,, pr22 X0)
   (λ (i : ∑ i : I, S i (pr1 x) ∧ S i (pr1 y))
    (j : ∑ i0 : I, S i0 (pr1 x) ∧ S i0 (pr1 y)),
    chain_union_prelim_eq0 chain (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
      (pr1 i) (pr1 j) (pr12 i) (pr12 j) (pr22 i)
      (pr22 j)) h = (pr1 x,, s ≤ pr1 y,, t))%type

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset
i: I
s: S i (pr1 x)
t: S i (pr1 y)
h: ∃ i : I, S i (pr1 x) ∧ S i (pr1 y)
(hinhpr (i,, s,, t) = h)%type
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset
i: I
s: S i (pr1 x)
t: S i (pr1 y)
h: ∃ i : I, S i (pr1 x) ∧ S i (pr1 y)
e: (hinhpr (i,, s,, t) = h)%type
(squash_to_hSet
   (λ X0 : ∑ i : I, S i (pr1 x) ∧ S i (pr1 y),
    pr1 x,, pr12 X0 ≤ pr1 y,, pr22 X0)
   (λ (i : ∑ i : I, S i (pr1 x) ∧ S i (pr1 y))
    (j : ∑ i0 : I, S i0 (pr1 x) ∧ S i0 (pr1 y)),
    chain_union_prelim_eq0 chain 
      (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 i) 
      (pr1 j) (pr12 i) (pr12 j) 
      (pr22 i) (pr22 j)) h = 
 (pr1 x,, s ≤ pr1 y,, t))%type

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset
i: I
s: S i (pr1 x)
t: S i (pr1 y)
h: ∃ i : I, S i (pr1 x) ∧ S i (pr1 y)
(hinhpr (i,, s,, t) = h)%type
 apply propproperty. 
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset
i: I
s: S i (pr1 x)
t: S i (pr1 y)
h: ∃ i : I, S i (pr1 x) ∧ S i (pr1 y)
e: (hinhpr (i,, s,, t) = h)%type
(squash_to_hSet
   (λ X0 : ∑ i : I, S i (pr1 x) ∧ S i (pr1 y),
    pr1 x,, pr12 X0 ≤ pr1 y,, pr22 X0)
   (λ (i : ∑ i : I, S i (pr1 x) ∧ S i (pr1 y))
    (j : ∑ i0 : I, S i0 (pr1 x) ∧ S i0 (pr1 y)),
    chain_union_prelim_eq0 chain (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
      (pr1 i) (pr1 j) (pr12 i) (pr12 j) (pr22 i)
      (pr22 j)) h = (pr1 x,, s ≤ pr1 y,, t))%type

  now induction e.
Defined.

X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
x, y, z: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i)) y)%subset
i: I
r: S i (pr1 x)
s: S i (pr1 y)
l: pr1 x,, r ≤ pr1 y,, s
t: S i (pr1 z)
m: pr1 y,, s ≤ pr1 z,, t
tot: istrans (WOSrel (S i))
pr1 x,, r ≤ pr1 z,, t

  exact (tot _ _ _ l m).
Defined.

isantisymm (chain_union_rel Schain)

I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
istotal (chain_union_rel Schain)

Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
istrans (chain_union_rel Schain)
 apply chain_union_rel_istrans.

I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
isrefl (chain_union_rel Schain)
 apply chain_union_rel_isrefl.

S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
isantisymm (chain_union_rel Schain)
 apply chain_union_rel_isantisymm.

I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X

istotal (chain_union_rel Schain)
 apply chain_union_rel_istotal.
Defined.


Setting chain constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"⋃ _".


(** ** The union of a chain of well ordered subsets *)


X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
(S i ≼ (⋃ Schain))%tosubset


X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
(S i ≼ (⋃ Schain))%tosubset

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
tosub_order_compat
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i)

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
s, s': S i
j: (s ≤ s')%tosubset
(subtype_inc
   (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i) s
 ≤ subtype_inc
     (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i) s')%tosubset

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
s, s': S i
j: (s ≤ s')%tosubset
u:= subtype_inc (λ (x : X) (J : S i x), hinhpr (i,, J))
  s
:
⋃ Schain: ⋃ Schain
(subtype_inc
   (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i) s
 ≤ subtype_inc
     (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i) s')%tosubset

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
s, s': S i
j: (s ≤ s')%tosubset
u:= subtype_inc (λ (x : X) (J : S i x), hinhpr (i,, J))
  s
:
⋃ Schain: ⋃ Schain
u':= subtype_inc
  (λ (x : X) (J : S i x), hinhpr (i,, J)) s'
:
⋃ Schain: ⋃ Schain
(subtype_inc
   (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i) s
 ≤ subtype_inc
     (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i) s')%tosubset

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
s, s': S i
j: (s ≤ s')%tosubset
u:= subtype_inc (λ (x : X) (J : S i x), hinhpr (i,, J))
  s
:
⋃ Schain: ⋃ Schain
u':= subtype_inc
  (λ (x : X) (J : S i x), hinhpr (i,, J)) s'
:
⋃ Schain: ⋃ Schain
chain_union_rel Schain u u'

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
s, s': S i
j: (s ≤ s')%tosubset
u:= subtype_inc (λ (x : X) (J : S i x), hinhpr (i,, J))
  s
:
⋃ Schain: ⋃ Schain
u':= subtype_inc
  (λ (x : X) (J : S i x), hinhpr (i,, J)) s'
:
⋃ Schain: ⋃ Schain
q: (chain_union_rel Schain u u' =
 (pr1 u,, pr2 s ≤ pr1 u',, pr2 s'))%type
chain_union_rel Schain u u'

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
s, s': S i
j: (s ≤ s')%tosubset
u:= subtype_inc (λ (x : X) (J : S i x), hinhpr (i,, J))
  s
:
⋃ Schain: ⋃ Schain
u':= subtype_inc
  (λ (x : X) (J : S i x), hinhpr (i,, J)) s'
:
⋃ Schain: ⋃ Schain
pr1 u,, pr2 s ≤ pr1 u',, pr2 s'
 exact j.
Defined.


X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
∀ (s : S i) (t : ⋃ Schain),
(t ≤ inc s)%tosubset ⇒ t ∈ S i


X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
∀ (s : S i) (t : ⋃ Schain),
(t ≤ inc s)%tosubset ⇒ t ∈ S i

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
s: S i
t: ⋃ Schain
le: (t ≤ inc s)%tosubset
t ∈ S i

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
s: S i
t: ⋃ Schain
le: (t ≤ inc s)%tosubset
(∑ j : I, S i ≼ S j ∧ S j (pr1 t)) → t ∈ S i

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
s: S i
t: ⋃ Schain
le: (t ≤ inc s)%tosubset
j: I
ij: S i ⊆ S j
com: tosub_order_compat ij
ini: sub_initial ij
tinSj: S j (pr1 t)
t ∈ S i
 
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
s: S i
t: ⋃ Schain
le: (t ≤ inc s)%tosubset
j: I
ij: S i ⊆ S j
com: tosub_order_compat ij
ini: sub_initial ij
tinSj: S j (pr1 t)
t':= pr1 t,, tinSj : S j: S j
t ∈ S i
 
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
s: S i
t: ⋃ Schain
le: (t ≤ inc s)%tosubset
j: I
ij: S i ⊆ S j
com: tosub_order_compat ij
ini: ∀ (s t : X) (Ss : S i s) 
(Tt : S j t),
(t,, Tt ≤ s,, ij s Ss)%tosubset ⇒ S i t
tinSj: S j (pr1 t)
t':= pr1 t,, tinSj : S j: S j
t ∈ S i

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
s: S i
t: ⋃ Schain
le: (t ≤ inc s)%tosubset
j: I
ij: S i ⊆ S j
com: tosub_order_compat ij
ini: ∀ (s t : X) (Ss : S i s) 
(Tt : S j t),
(t,, Tt ≤ s,, ij s Ss)%tosubset ⇒ S i t
tinSj: S j (pr1 t)
t':= pr1 t,, tinSj : S j: S j
K: (pr1 t,, tinSj ≤ pr1 s,, ij (pr1 s) (pr2 s))%tosubset
→ WOSubset_to_subtype (S i) (pr1 t)
t ∈ S i
 
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
s: S i
t: ⋃ Schain
le: (t ≤ inc s)%tosubset
j: I
ij: S i ⊆ S j
com: tosub_order_compat ij
ini: ∀ (s t : X) (Ss : S i s) 
(Tt : S j t),
(t,, Tt ≤ s,, ij s Ss)%tosubset ⇒ S i t
tinSj: S j (pr1 t)
t':= pr1 t,, tinSj : S j: S j
K: t' ≤ subtype_inc ij s → t ∈ S i
t ∈ S i

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
s: S i
t: ⋃ Schain
le: (t ≤ inc s)%tosubset
j: I
ij: S i ⊆ S j
com: tosub_order_compat ij
ini: ∀ (s t : X) (Ss : S i s) 
(Tt : S j t),
(t,, Tt ≤ s,, ij s Ss)%tosubset ⇒ S i t

t':= pr1 t,, tinSj : S j: S j

X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
s: S i
t: ⋃ Schain
le: (t ≤ inc s)%tosubset
j: I
ij: S i ⊆ S j
com: ∀ s s' : S i,
(s ≤ s')%tosubset
⇒ (subtype_inc ij s ≤ subtype_inc ij s')%tosubset
ini: ∀ (s t : X) (Ss : S i s) 
(Tt : S j t),
(t,, Tt ≤ s,, ij s Ss)%tosubset ⇒ S i t
tinSj: S j (pr1 t)
t':= pr1 t,, tinSj : S j: S j
t' ≤ subtype_inc ij s

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
s: S i
t: ⋃ Schain
le: (t ≤ inc s)%tosubset
j: I
ij: S i ⊆ S j
com: ∀ s s' : S i,
(s ≤ s')%tosubset
⇒ (subtype_inc ij s ≤ subtype_inc ij s')%tosubset
ini: ∀ (s t : X) (Ss : S i s) 
(Tt : S j t),
(t,, Tt ≤ s,, ij s Ss)%tosubset ⇒ S i t
tinSj: S j (pr1 t)
t':= pr1 t,, tinSj : S j: S j
(subtype_inc (pr1 (chain_union_tosub_le Schain j)) t'
 ≤ subtype_inc (pr1 (chain_union_tosub_le Schain j))
     (subtype_inc ij s))%tosubset

j: I

t':= pr1 t,, tinSj : S j: S j
(subtype_inc (pr1 (chain_union_tosub_le Schain j)) t'
 ≤ subtype_inc (pr1 (chain_union_tosub_le Schain j))
     (subtype_inc ij s))%tosubset

j: I

tinSj: S j (pr1 t)
t':= pr1 t,, tinSj : S j: S j
(t =
 subtype_inc (pr1 (chain_union_tosub_le Schain j)) t')%type
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
s: S i
t: ⋃ Schain
le: (t ≤ inc s)%tosubset
j: I
ij: S i ⊆ S j
tinSj: S j (pr1 t)
t':= pr1 t,, tinSj : S j: S j
p: (t =
 subtype_inc (pr1 (chain_union_tosub_le Schain j))
   t')%type
(subtype_inc (pr1 (chain_union_tosub_le Schain j)) t'
 ≤ subtype_inc (pr1 (chain_union_tosub_le Schain j))
     (subtype_inc ij s))%tosubset

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
s: S i
t: ⋃ Schain
le: (t ≤ inc s)%tosubset
j: I
ij: S i ⊆ S j
tinSj: S j (pr1 t)
t':= pr1 t,, tinSj : S j: S j
(t =
 subtype_inc (pr1 (chain_union_tosub_le Schain j)) t')%type
 now apply subtypePath_prop.

I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X

s: S i
t: ⋃ Schain
le: (t ≤ inc s)%tosubset
j: I

tinSj: S j (pr1 t)
t':= pr1 t,, tinSj : S j: S j
(inc s =
 subtype_inc (pr1 (chain_union_tosub_le Schain j))
   (subtype_inc ij s))%type
 now apply subtypePath_prop.

I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
s: S i
t: ⋃ Schain
le: (t ≤ inc s)%tosubset
j: I
ij: S i ⊆ S j
tinSj: S j (pr1 t)
t':= pr1 t,, tinSj : S j: S j
q: (inc s =
 subtype_inc (pr1 (chain_union_tosub_le Schain j))
   (subtype_inc ij s))%type
