X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
inc:= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i): S i → (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
s: S i
t: ⋃ Schain
le: (t ≤ inc s)%tosubset
j: I
ij: S i ⊆ S j
tinSj: S j (pr1 t)
t':= pr1 t,, tinSj : S j: S j
(t ≤ inc s)%tosubset

  exact le.
Defined.


X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
hasSmallest (chain_union_rel chain)


X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
hasSmallest (chain_union_rel chain)

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
t': ∃ x : (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset,
T x
∃ x : (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset,
T x
∧ (∀ y : (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset,
   T y ⇒ chain_union_rel chain x y)

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
x: X
i: (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype x
xinT: T (x,, i)
∃ x : (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset,
T x
∧ (∀ y : (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset,
   T y ⇒ chain_union_rel chain x y)

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
x: X
i: (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype x
xinT: T (x,, i)
j: I
xinSj: S j x
∃ x : (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset,
T x
∧ (∀ y : (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset,
   T y ⇒ chain_union_rel chain x y)

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
x: X
j: I
xinSj: S j x
xinT: T (x,, hinhpr (j,, xinSj))
∃ x : (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset,
T x
∧ (∀ y : (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset,
   T y ⇒ chain_union_rel chain x y)

  (* T' is the intersection of T with S j *)
  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
x: X
j: I
xinSj: S j x
xinT: T (x,, hinhpr (j,, xinSj))
T':= λ s : S j,
T
  (subtype_inc
     (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j)
     s): S j → hProp
∃ x : (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset,
T x
∧ (∀ y : (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset,
   T y ⇒ chain_union_rel chain x y)

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
j: I
T':= λ s : S j,
T
  (subtype_inc
     (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j)
     s): S j → hProp
t': ∥ T' ∥
∃ x : (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset,
T x
∧ (∀ y : (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset,
   T y ⇒ chain_union_rel chain x y)

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
j: I
T':= λ s : S j,
T
  (subtype_inc
     (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j)
     s): S j → hProp
min: ∃ x : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset,
T' x
∧ (∀
   y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset,
   T' y ⇒ x ≤ y)
∃ x : (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset,
T x
∧ (∀ y : (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset,
   T y ⇒ chain_union_rel chain x y)

  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
j: I
T':= λ s : S j,
T
  (subtype_inc
     (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j)
     s): S j → hProp
t0: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset
t0inT': T' t0
t0min: ∀
y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset,
T' y ⇒ t0 ≤ y
∃ x : (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset,
T x
∧ (∀ y : (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset,
   T y ⇒ chain_union_rel chain x y)

  (* t0 is the minimal element of T' *)
  
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
j: I

T
  (subtype_inc
     (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j)
     s): S j → hProp
t0: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset
t0inT': T' t0
t0min: ∀
y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset,
T' y ⇒ t0 ≤ y
t0':= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j) t0: (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
∃ x : (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset,
T x
∧ (∀ y : (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset,
   T y ⇒ chain_union_rel chain x y)

y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset,
T' y ⇒ t0 ≤ y

(∑ x : (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset,
 T x
 ∧ (∀ y : (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset,
    T y ⇒ chain_union_rel chain x y))%type

T t0'
∧ (∀ y : (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset,
   T y ⇒ chain_union_rel chain t0' y)

T t0'
 exact t0inT'.

X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
j: I
T':= λ s : S j,
T
  (subtype_inc
     (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j)
     s): S j → hProp
t0: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset
t0inT': T' t0
t0min: ∀
y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset,
T' y ⇒ t0 ≤ y
t0':= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j) t0: (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
t: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
tinT: T t
chain_union_rel chain t0' t

    (* now show any other element t of T is at least as big as t0' *)
    (* for that purpose, we may assume t ≤ t0' *)
    
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
j: I
T':= λ s : S j,
T
  (subtype_inc
     (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j)
     s): S j → hProp
t0: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset
t0inT': T' t0
t0min: ∀
y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset,
T' y ⇒ t0 ≤ y
t0':= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j) t0: (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
t: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
tinT: T t
tle: chain_union_rel chain t t0'
chain_union_rel chain t0' t

    
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
j: I
T':= λ s : S j,
T
  (subtype_inc
     (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j)
     s): S j → hProp
t0: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset
t0inT': T' t0
t0min: ∀
y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset,
T' y ⇒ t0 ≤ y
t0':= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j) t0: (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
t: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
tinT: T t
tle: chain_union_rel chain t t0'
q:= chain_union_rel_initial chain j t0 t tle: t ∈ S j
chain_union_rel chain t0' t

    
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
j: I
T':= λ s : S j,
T
  (subtype_inc
     (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j)
     s): S j → hProp
t0: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset
t0inT': T' t0
t0min: ∀
y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset,
T' y ⇒ t0 ≤ y
t0':= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j) t0: (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
t: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
tinT: T t
tle: chain_union_rel chain t t0'
q:= chain_union_rel_initial chain j t0 t tle: t ∈ S j
t':= pr1 t,, q : S j: S j
chain_union_rel chain t0' t

    
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
j: I
T':= λ s : S j,
T
  (subtype_inc
     (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j)
     s): S j → hProp
t0: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset
t0inT': T' t0
t0min: ∀
y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset,
T' y ⇒ t0 ≤ y
t0':= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j) t0: (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
t: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
tinT: T t
tle: chain_union_rel chain t t0'
q:= chain_union_rel_initial chain j t0 t tle: t ∈ S j
t':= pr1 t,, q : S j: S j
(subtype_inc
   (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j) t' = t)%type
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
j: I
T':= λ s : S j,
T
  (subtype_inc
     (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j)
     s): S j → hProp
t0: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset
t0inT': T' t0
t0min: ∀
y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset,
T' y ⇒ t0 ≤ y
t0':= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j) t0: (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
t: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
tinT: T t
tle: chain_union_rel chain t t0'
q:= chain_union_rel_initial chain j t0 t tle: t ∈ S j
t':= pr1 t,, q : S j: S j
E: (subtype_inc
   (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j) t' =
 t)%type
chain_union_rel chain t0' t

    
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X

  (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
j: I
T':= λ s : S j,
T
  (subtype_inc
     (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j)
     s): S j → hProp
t0: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset
t0inT': T' t0
t0min: ∀
y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset,
T' y ⇒ t0 ≤ y

  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j) t0: (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype

tle: chain_union_rel chain t t0'
q:= chain_union_rel_initial chain j t0 t tle: t ∈ S j
t':= pr1 t,, q : S j: S j
(subtype_inc
   (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j) t' = t)%type
 now apply subtypePath_prop.

X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
j: I
T':= λ s : S j,
T
  (subtype_inc
     (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j)
     s): S j → hProp
t0: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset
t0inT': T' t0
t0min: ∀
y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset,

  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j) t0: (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype

tle: chain_union_rel chain t t0'
q:= chain_union_rel_initial chain j t0 t tle: t ∈ S j
t':= pr1 t,, q : S j: S j
E: (subtype_inc
   (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j) t' =
 t)%type
chain_union_rel chain
  (subtype_inc
     (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j) t0)
  (subtype_inc
     (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j) t')

 t)%type
(t0 ≤ t')%tosubset

I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
j: I
T':= λ s : S j,
T
  (subtype_inc
     (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j)
     s): S j → hProp
t0: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset
t0inT': T' t0
t0min: ∀
y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset,
T' y ⇒ t0 ≤ y
t0':= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j) t0: (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
t: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
tinT: T t
tle: chain_union_rel chain t t0'
q:= chain_union_rel_initial chain j t0 t tle: t ∈ S j
t':= pr1 t,, q : S j: S j
E: (subtype_inc
   (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j) t' =
 t)%type
T
  (subtype_inc
     (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j) t')
 
X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
chain: is_wosubset_chain S
T: hsubtype
  (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
j: I
T':= λ s : S j,
T
  (subtype_inc
     (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j)
     s): S j → hProp
t0: (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset
t0inT': T' t0
t0min: ∀
y : (∑ y, WOSubset_to_subtype (S j) y)%subset,
T' y ⇒ t0 ≤ y
t0':= subtype_inc
  (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j) t0: (⋃ (λ x : I, S x))%subtype
t: (∑ y, (⋃ (λ i : I, S i))%subtype y)%subset
tinT: T t
tle: chain_union_rel chain t t0'
q:= chain_union_rel_initial chain j t0 t tle: t ∈ S j
t':= pr1 t,, q : S j: S j
E: (subtype_inc
   (subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) j) t' =
 t)%type
T t
 exact tinT.
Defined.

WOSubset X

Setting chain constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"⋃ _".

∀ i : I, S i ≼ (⋃ Schain)

X: hSet
I: UU
S: I → WOSubset X
Schain: is_wosubset_chain S
i: I
s, t: X
Ss: S i s
Tt: (⋃ Schain) t
(t,, Tt
 ≤ s,, subtype_union_containedIn (λ x : I, S x) i s Ss)%tosubset
⇒ S i t

    exact (chain_union_rel_initial Schain i (s,,Ss) (t,,Tt)).
Defined.

Definition proper_subtypes_set (X:UU) : hSet := ∑ S : subtype_set X, hProp_to_hSet (∃ x, ¬ (S x)).

(* the interval up to c, as a proper subset of X *)

X: hSet
C: WOSubset X
c: C
proper_subtypes_set X


X: hSet
C: WOSubset X
c: C
proper_subtypes_set X

  
X: hSet
C: WOSubset X
c: C
hProp_to_hSet (∃ x : X, ¬ upto c x)
 
X: hSet
C: WOSubset X
c: C
(∑ x : X, ¬ upto c x)%type
 
X: hSet
C: WOSubset X
c: C
¬ upto c (pr1 c)
 
X: hSet
C: WOSubset X
c: C
n: upto c (pr1 c)
∅

  
X: hSet
C: WOSubset X
c: C
n: (∑ x : WOSubset_to_subtype C (pr1 c),
 neg (c ≤ pr1 c,, x))%type
∅
 
X: hSet
C: WOSubset X
c: C
n: WOSubset_to_subtype C (pr1 c)
o: neg (c ≤ pr1 c,, n)
∅
 
X: hSet
C: WOSubset X
c: C
n: WOSubset_to_subtype C (pr1 c)
c ≤ pr1 c,, n

  
X: hSet
C: WOSubset X
c: C
n: WOSubset_to_subtype C (pr1 c)
c = pr1 c,, n
 now apply subtypePath_prop.
Defined.

(** ** Choice functions *)

(** A choice function provides an element not in each proper subset.  *)

Definition choice_fun (X:hSet) : hSet := ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X, ∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x).


X: hSet
AxiomOfChoice ⇒ ∥ choice_fun X ∥


X: hSet
AxiomOfChoice ⇒ ∥ choice_fun X ∥

  
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
∥ choice_fun X ∥

  exact (squash_to_hProp (ac (proper_subtypes_set X)
                             (λ S, ∑ x, hProp_to_hSet (¬ (pr1 S x))) pr2)
                         hinhpr).
Defined.

(** Given a choice function g, we single out well ordered subsets C of X that
    follow the choice functions advice when constructed by adding one element at
    a time to the top.  We may say that C is "guided" by g. *)

Definition is_guided_WOSubset {X:hSet} (g : choice_fun X) (C : WOSubset X) : hProp
  := ∀ c:C, pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)).


X: hSet
g: choice_fun X
C, D: WOSubset X
j: C ≼ D
c: C
d: D
pr1 (subtype_inc (pr1 j) c) = pr1 d
→ pr1 (g (upto' c)) = pr1 (g (upto' d))


X: hSet
g: choice_fun X
C, D: WOSubset X
j: C ≼ D
c: C
d: D
pr1 (subtype_inc (pr1 j) c) = pr1 d
→ pr1 (g (upto' c)) = pr1 (g (upto' d))

  
X: hSet
g: choice_fun X
C, D: WOSubset X
j: C ≼ D
c: C
d: D
p: (pr1 (subtype_inc (pr1 j) c) = pr1 d)%type
(pr1 (g (upto' c)) = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type

c: C
d: D
p: (pr1 (subtype_inc (pr1 j) c) = pr1 d)%type
(upto' c = upto' d)%type

(subtype_inc (pr1 j) c = d)%type

j: C ≼ D

q: (subtype_inc (pr1 j) c = d)%type
(upto c = upto d)%type

(subtype_inc (pr1 j) c = d)%type
 now apply subtypePath_prop.

X: hSet
g: choice_fun X
C, D: WOSubset X
j: C ≼ D
c: C
(upto c = upto (subtype_inc (pr1 j) c))%type

    now apply upto_eqn. 
X: hSet
g: choice_fun X
C, D: WOSubset X
j: C ≼ D
c: C
d: D
p: (pr1 (subtype_inc (pr1 j) c) = pr1 d)%type
e': (upto' c = upto' d)%type
(pr1 (g (upto' c)) = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type

  now induction e'.
Defined.

Definition Guided_WOSubset {X:hSet} (g : choice_fun X) := (∑ C, is_guided_WOSubset g C)%type.

Definition guidedFamily {X:hSet} (g : choice_fun X) : Guided_WOSubset g -> WOSubset X
  := pr1.

Coercion guidedFamily : Guided_WOSubset >-> WOSubset.

(** ** The guided well ordered subsets form a chain *)


X: hSet
g: choice_fun X
LEM → is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)


X: hSet
g: choice_fun X
LEM → is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)

  
X: hSet
g: choice_fun X
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
wosub_comparable (C,, gC) (D,, gD)

  
X: hSet
g: choice_fun X
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
wosub_comparable (C,, gC) (D,, gD)

gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C

W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
Q: common_initial (max_common_initial C D) C D
wosub_comparable (C,, gC) (D,, gD)

lem: LEM

gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
wosub_comparable (C,, gC) (D,, gD)

W ≡ C ∨ W ≡ D

 exact WC.
      
X: hSet
g: choice_fun X
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D

WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
W ≢ C
 now apply subtype_notEqual_from_negEqual. 
X: hSet
g: choice_fun X
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X

nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
∅

nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)

D ⊈ W

nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)

X: hSet
g: choice_fun X
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
W ⊆ D
 exact WD.
      
X: hSet
g: choice_fun X
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
W ≢ D
 now apply subtype_notEqual_from_negEqual.

g: choice_fun X
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
∅

X: hSet
g: choice_fun X
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X

D: WOSubset X

W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X

X: hSet
g: choice_fun X
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X

nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)

X: hSet

lem: LEM

(W = upto c)%type

X: hSet
g: choice_fun X
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X

WD: W ⊆ D

c: C

d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
(W = upto c)%type
 now apply (invmap (hsubtype_univalence _ _)).

g: choice_fun X
lem: LEM

nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)

nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D

de: (W = upto d)%type

(upto' c = upto' d)%type
 now apply subtypePath_prop.

lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C

WDi: sub_initial WD

nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type

X: hSet
g: choice_fun X
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
cd': (upto' c = upto' d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
hfalse

    
X: hSet
g: choice_fun X
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
cd': (upto' c = upto' d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
hfalse

    
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
cd': (upto' c = upto' d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
hfalse

    
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
cd': (upto' c = upto' d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
(pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
cd': (upto' c = upto' d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
hfalse

    
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
cd': (upto' c = upto' d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
(pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
cd': (upto' c = upto' d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
(pr1 (g (upto' c)) = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
 now induction cd'. 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
cd': (upto' c = upto' d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
hfalse

C: WOSubset X

D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
hfalse

    
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type

W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X

X: hSet

∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X

j: W ⊆ W'

X: hSet

X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
common_initial W' C D

      
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
sub_initial W'C
∧ sub_initial W'D ∧ same_induced_ordering W'C W'D

      
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
(∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
sub_initial W'C
∧ sub_initial W'D ∧ same_induced_ordering W'C W'D

      
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
(∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
v: W'
W'c': W' (pr1 c)
subtype_inc W'C v ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c')
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
v: W'
W'c': W' (pr1 c)
(c = subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c'))%type
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
v: W'
W'c': W' (pr1 c)
e: (c = subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c'))%type
subtype_inc W'C v ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c')

        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
v: W'
W'c': W' (pr1 c)
(c = subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c'))%type
 now apply subtypePath_prop.

g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X

nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X

W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
v: W'
W'c': W' (pr1 c)
e: (c = subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c'))%type
subtype_inc W'C v ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c')

        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
v: W'
W'c': W' (pr1 c)
subtype_inc W'C v ≤ c

c: C

d: D

q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X

W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
v: W'
subtype_inc W'C v ≤ c

C: WOSubset X

nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)

nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d

cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type

subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) ≤ c

X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type

q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type

j: W ⊆ W'

W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D

W'v: W' v
Wv: W v
L: upto c v
subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) ≤ c
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
v: X
W'v: W' v
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : C v, ¬ (c ≤ v,, h))%prop
subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) ≤ c

          
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
v: X
W'v: W' v
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : C v, ¬ (c ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ c)%tosubset
subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) ≤ c

          now apply(h1'' Q).
        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
v: X
W'v: W' v
k: (pr1 c = v)%type
subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) ≤ c
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
v: X
W'v: W' v
k: (pr1 c = v)%type
subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) = c
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
v: X
W'v: W' v
k: (pr1 c = v)%type
(pr1 (subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v)) = pr1 c)%type
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
v: X
W'v: W' v
k: (pr1 c = v)%type
(v = pr1 c)%type
 exact (!k). 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
sub_initial W'C
∧ sub_initial W'D ∧ same_induced_ordering W'C W'D

      
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
(∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
sub_initial W'C
∧ sub_initial W'D ∧ same_induced_ordering W'C W'D

      
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D

nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type

W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
(∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
w: W
W'c': W' (pr1 c)
subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c')
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
w: W
W'c': W' (pr1 c)
(c = subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c'))%type
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
w: W
W'c': W' (pr1 c)
e: (c = subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c'))%type
subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c')

        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
w: W
W'c': W' (pr1 c)
(c = subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c'))%type
 now apply subtypePath_prop. 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
w: W
W'c': W' (pr1 c)
e: (c = subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c'))%type
subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c')

        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
w: W
W'c': W' (pr1 c)
subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) < c
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
w: W
subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) < c
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv)) < c

        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: upto c v
subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv)) < c
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : C v, ¬ (c ≤ v,, h))%prop
subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv)) < c

        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : C v, ¬ (c ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ c)%tosubset
subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv)) < c

        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : C v, ¬ (c ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ c)%tosubset
(subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv)) ≤ c)%tosubset
∧ ¬ (subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv)) = c)

        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : C v, ¬ (c ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ c)%tosubset
(subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv)) ≤ c)%tosubset
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : C v, ¬ (c ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ c)%tosubset
¬ (subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv)) = c)

        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : C v, ¬ (c ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ c)%tosubset
(subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv)) ≤ c)%tosubset
 now apply (h1'' Q).
        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : C v, ¬ (c ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ c)%tosubset
¬ (subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv)) = c)
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : C v, ¬ (c ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ c)%tosubset
e: subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv)) = c
∅
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : C v, ¬ (c ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ c)%tosubset
e': (pr1 (subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv))) =
 pr1 c)%type
∅
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D

WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : C v, ¬ (c ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ c)%tosubset
e': (v = pr1 c)%type
∅

          
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : C v, ¬ (c ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ c)%tosubset
e': (v = pr1 c)%type
L': (λ x : C v, (λ h : C v, ¬ (c ≤ v,, h)) x) (pr1 L)
∅

lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X

nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)

W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : C v, ¬ (c ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ c)%tosubset
e': (v = pr1 c)%type
L': neg (c ≤ v,, pr1 L)
∅
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : C v, ¬ (c ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ c)%tosubset
e': (v = pr1 c)%type
c ≤ v,, pr1 L

          exact (TOeq_to_refl_1 C c (v,, pr1 L) (!e')). 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
sub_initial W'C
∧ sub_initial W'D ∧ same_induced_ordering W'C W'D

      
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
(∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type

lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C

nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)

d: D

W'd: W' (pr1 d)

W'D: W' ⊆ D

 subtype_inc W'C v

 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <

dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),

∧ sub_initial W'D ∧ same_induced_ordering W'C W'D

C: WOSubset X

d: D

W'd: W' (pr1 d)

lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: W'
W'd': W' (pr1 d)
subtype_inc W'D v ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd')

lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C

gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D

nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)

c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type

W'd: W' (pr1 d)

W'D: W' ⊆ D

 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: W'
W'd': W' (pr1 d)
(d = subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd'))%type

g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C

WC: W ⊆ C

nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)

c: C

d: D

W'd: W' (pr1 d)

 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <

subtype_inc W'D v ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd')

        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: W'
W'd': W' (pr1 d)
(d = subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd'))%type
 now apply subtypePath_prop. 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: W'
W'd': W' (pr1 d)
e: (d = subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd'))%type
subtype_inc W'D v ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd')

        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: W'
W'd': W' (pr1 d)
subtype_inc W'D v ≤ d

g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type

j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
Wv: W v
L: upto d v
subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v) ≤ d
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : D v, ¬ (d ≤ v,, h))%prop
subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v) ≤ d

          
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : D v, ¬ (d ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ d)%tosubset
subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v) ≤ d

          now apply(h1'' Q).

W'd: W' (pr1 d)

W'D: W' ⊆ D

 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type

subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v) ≤ d

W'd: W' (pr1 d)

 subtype_inc W'C v

 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type

X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'

W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D

 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
k: (pr1 c = v)%type
(pr1 (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)) = pr1 d)%type
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D

nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
k: (pr1 c = v)%type
(v = pr1 d)%type
 exact (!k @ cd1). 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
sub_initial W'C
∧ sub_initial W'D ∧ same_induced_ordering W'C W'D

W'd: W' (pr1 d)

 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
(∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),

 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type

C: WOSubset X

nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'

W'd: W' (pr1 d)

 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
sub_initial W'C
∧ sub_initial W'D ∧ same_induced_ordering W'C W'D

nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)

d: D

q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type

j: W ⊆ W'

W'd: W' (pr1 d)

W'D: W' ⊆ D

 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
(∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),

X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
w: W
W'd': W' (pr1 d)
subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd')
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
w: W
W'd': W' (pr1 d)
(d = subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd'))%type
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
w: W
W'd': W' (pr1 d)
e: (d = subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd'))%type
subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd')

        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
w: W
W'd': W' (pr1 d)
(d = subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd'))%type
 now apply subtypePath_prop. 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
w: W
W'd': W' (pr1 d)
e: (d = subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd'))%type
subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd')

        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
w: W
W'd': W' (pr1 d)
subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) < d
