∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D

WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type

j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)

W'D: W' ⊆ D

 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
w: W
subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) < d
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv)) < d

        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: upto d v
subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv)) < d
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : D v, ¬ (d ≤ v,, h))%prop
subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv)) < d

        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : D v, ¬ (d ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ d)%tosubset
subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv)) < d

        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : D v, ¬ (d ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ d)%tosubset
(subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv)) ≤ d)%tosubset
∧ ¬ (subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv)) = d)

j: W ⊆ W'

W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D

 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type

 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : D v, ¬ (d ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ d)%tosubset
(subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv)) ≤ d)%tosubset

∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)

C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X

WC: W ⊆ C

WCi: sub_initial WC

nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)

nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D

 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type

 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X

L: (∑ h : D v, ¬ (d ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ d)%tosubset
¬ (subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv)) = d)

        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : D v, ¬ (d ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ d)%tosubset
(subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv)) ≤ d)%tosubset
 now apply (h1'' Q).
        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : D v, ¬ (d ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ d)%tosubset
¬ (subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv)) = d)
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : D v, ¬ (d ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ d)%tosubset
e: subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv)) = d
∅
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : D v, ¬ (d ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ d)%tosubset
e': (pr1 (subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j (v,, Wv))) =
 pr1 d)%type
∅
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : D v, ¬ (d ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ d)%tosubset
e': (v = pr1 d)%type
∅

          
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : D v, ¬ (d ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ d)%tosubset
e': (v = pr1 d)%type
L': (λ x : D v, (λ h : D v, ¬ (d ≤ v,, h)) x) (pr1 L)
∅

Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ d)%tosubset
e': (v = pr1 d)%type
L': neg (d ≤ v,, pr1 L)
∅
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
Wv: W v
L: (∑ h : D v, ¬ (d ≤ v,, h))%prop
Q: (v,, pr1 L ≤ d)%tosubset
e': (v = pr1 d)%type
d ≤ v,, pr1 L

          exact (TOeq_to_refl_1 D d (v,, pr1 L) (!e')). 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
sub_initial W'C
∧ sub_initial W'D ∧ same_induced_ordering W'C W'D

C: WOSubset X

W'd: W' (pr1 d)

W'D: W' ⊆ D

 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type

d: D

 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
sub_initial W'D ∧ same_induced_ordering W'C W'D

de: (W = upto d)%type

q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type

W'd: W' (pr1 d)

W'D: W' ⊆ D

 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type

X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
w', c': X
W'w': W' w'
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ w',, W'C w' W'w')%tosubset
W' c'

        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
w', c': X
W'w': W' w'
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ w',, W'C w' W'w')%tosubset
B: W w' ⨿ (pr1 c = w')%type
W' c'

lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C

nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
w', c': X
W'w': W' w'
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ w',, W'C w' W'w')%tosubset
Ww': W w'
W' c'
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
w', c': X
W'w': W' w'
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ w',, W'C w' W'w')%tosubset
e: (pr1 c = w')%type
W' c'

C: WOSubset X

nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)

c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type

j: W ⊆ W'

W'd: W' (pr1 d)

W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
w', c': X
W'w': W' w'
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ w',, W'C w' W'w')%tosubset
Ww': W w'
W' c'

lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X

nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)

nDW: D ⊈ W

cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D

ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type

p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type

W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
w', c': X
W'w': W' w'
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ w',, W'C w' W'w')%tosubset
Ww': W w'
(c',, Cc' ≤ w',, WC w' Ww')%tosubset
 now apply (h1'' le).
        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
w', c': X
W'w': W' w'
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ w',, W'C w' W'w')%tosubset
e: (pr1 c = w')%type
W' c'
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
c': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ pr1 c,, W'C (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
W' c'

          
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
c': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ pr1 c,, W'C (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
e: pr1 c = c'
W' c'
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
c': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ pr1 c,, W'C (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 c = c')
W' c'

          
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
c': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ pr1 c,, W'C (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
e: pr1 c = c'
W' c'
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Cc': C (pr1 c)
le: (pr1 c,, Cc' ≤ pr1 c,, W'C (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
W' (pr1 c)
 exact W'c.
          
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
c': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ pr1 c,, W'C (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 c = c')
W' c'

g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,

lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D

WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D

WDi: sub_initial WD

nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D

 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
c': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ pr1 c,, W'C (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 c = c')
W c'
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
c': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ pr1 c,, W'C (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 c = c')
upto c c'
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
c': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ pr1 c,, W'C (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 c = c')
c',, Cc' < c
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
c': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ pr1 c,, W'C (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 c = c')
¬ (c ≤ c',, Cc')
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
c': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ pr1 c,, W'C (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 c = c')
le': c ≤ c',, Cc'
∅
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
c': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ pr1 c,, W'C (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 c = c')
le': c ≤ c',, Cc'
pr1 c = c'

            
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
c': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ pr1 c,, W'C (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 c = c')
le': c ≤ c',, Cc'
(c = c',, Cc')%type
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
c': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ pr1 c,, W'C (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 c = c')
le': c ≤ c',, Cc'
e: (c = c',, Cc')%type
pr1 c = c'

            
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
c': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ pr1 c,, W'C (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 c = c')
le': c ≤ c',, Cc'
(c = c',, Cc')%type
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
c': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ pr1 c,, W'C (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 c = c')
le': c ≤ c',, Cc'
(c ≤ c',, Cc')%tosubset
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
c': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ pr1 c,, W'C (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 c = c')
le': c ≤ c',, Cc'
(c',, Cc' ≤ c)%tosubset

              
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
c': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ pr1 c,, W'C (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 c = c')
le': c ≤ c',, Cc'
(c ≤ c',, Cc')%tosubset
 exact le'.
              
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
c': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ pr1 c,, W'C (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 c = c')
le': c ≤ c',, Cc'
(c',, Cc' ≤ c)%tosubset
 now apply (h1'' le). 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
c': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Cc': C c'
le: (c',, Cc' ≤ pr1 c,, W'C (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 c = c')
le': c ≤ c',, Cc'
e: (c = c',, Cc')%type
pr1 c = c'

            exact (maponpaths pr1 e). 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
sub_initial W'D ∧ same_induced_ordering W'C W'D

      
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
sub_initial W'D
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
same_induced_ordering W'C W'D

      
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
sub_initial W'D
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
w', d': X
W'w': W' w'
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ w',, W'D w' W'w')%tosubset
W' d'

        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
w', d': X
W'w': W' w'
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ w',, W'D w' W'w')%tosubset
B: W w' ⨿ (pr1 c = w')%type
W' d'

nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)

nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D

ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type

q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type

j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D

 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
w', d': X
W'w': W' w'
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ w',, W'D w' W'w')%tosubset
Ww': W w'
W' d'
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
w', d': X
W'w': W' w'
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ w',, W'D w' W'w')%tosubset
e: (pr1 c = w')%type
W' d'

        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
w', d': X
W'w': W' w'
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ w',, W'D w' W'w')%tosubset
Ww': W w'
W' d'

g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D

WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
w', d': X
W'w': W' w'
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ w',, W'D w' W'w')%tosubset
Ww': W w'
W d'
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
w', d': X
W'w': W' w'
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ w',, W'D w' W'w')%tosubset
Ww': W w'
(d',, Dd' ≤ w',, WD w' Ww')%tosubset
 now apply (h1'' le).
        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
w', d': X
W'w': W' w'
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ w',, W'D w' W'w')%tosubset
e: (pr1 c = w')%type
W' d'
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
d': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ pr1 c,, W'D (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
W' d'

          
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
d': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ pr1 c,, W'D (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
e: pr1 d = d'
W' d'
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
d': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ pr1 c,, W'D (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 d = d')
W' d'

          
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
d': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ pr1 c,, W'D (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
e: pr1 d = d'
W' d'
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Dd': D (pr1 d)
le: (pr1 d,, Dd' ≤ pr1 c,, W'D (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
W' (pr1 d)
 exact W'd.
          
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
d': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ pr1 c,, W'D (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 d = d')
W' d'

 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <

W d'

g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type

j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)

W'D: W' ⊆ D

 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
d': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ pr1 c,, W'D (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 d = d')
upto d d'
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
d': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ pr1 c,, W'D (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 d = d')
d',, Dd' < d
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
d': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ pr1 c,, W'D (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 d = d')
¬ (d ≤ d',, Dd')
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
d': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ pr1 c,, W'D (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 d = d')
le': d ≤ d',, Dd'
∅

g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D

WC: W ⊆ C

nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)

nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type

j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)

W'D: W' ⊆ D

 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),

dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <

W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Dd': D d'
