ne: neg (pr1 d = d')
le': d ≤ d',, Dd'
pr1 d = d'

            
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
d': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ pr1 c,, W'D (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 d = d')
le': d ≤ d',, Dd'
(d = d',, Dd')%type
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
d': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ pr1 c,, W'D (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 d = d')
le': d ≤ d',, Dd'
e: (d = d',, Dd')%type
pr1 d = d'

            
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
d': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ pr1 c,, W'D (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 d = d')
le': d ≤ d',, Dd'
(d = d',, Dd')%type
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
d': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ pr1 c,, W'D (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 d = d')
le': d ≤ d',, Dd'
(d ≤ d',, Dd')%tosubset
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
d': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ pr1 c,, W'D (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 d = d')
le': d ≤ d',, Dd'
(d',, Dd' ≤ d)%tosubset

              
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
d': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ pr1 c,, W'D (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 d = d')
le': d ≤ d',, Dd'
(d ≤ d',, Dd')%tosubset
 exact le'.
              
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
d': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ pr1 c,, W'D (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 d = d')
le': d ≤ d',, Dd'
(d',, Dd' ≤ d)%tosubset
 now apply (h1'' le). 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
d': X
W'w': W' (pr1 c)
Dd': D d'
le: (d',, Dd' ≤ pr1 c,, W'D (pr1 c) W'w')%tosubset
ne: neg (pr1 d = d')
le': d ≤ d',, Dd'
e: (d = d',, Dd')%type
pr1 d = d'

            exact (maponpaths pr1 e). 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
same_induced_ordering W'C W'D

      
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
same_induced_ordering W'C W'D

        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
w: X
W'w: W' w
(subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
w: X
W'w: W' w
(subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
w: X
W'w: W' w
Wv: W v
(subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C

nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)

cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D

de: (W = upto d)%type

q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type

W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)

W'D: W' ⊆ D

 subtype_inc W'C v

dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v

 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type

W'v: W' v
w: X
W'w: W' w

(subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,

lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D

WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type

q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type

j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)

W'D: W' ⊆ D

 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type

 subtype_inc W'D v

 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
w: X
W'w: W' w
Wv: W v
Ew: (pr1 c = w)%type
(subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

          
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
w: X
W'w: W' w
Wv: W v
Ww: W w
(subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
w: X
W'w: W' w
Wv: W v
Ww: W w
Q: (λ y : max_common_initial C D,
 (subtype_inc WC (v,, Wv) ≤ subtype_inc WC y)%tosubset
 ⇔ (subtype_inc WD (v,, Wv) ≤ subtype_inc WD y)%tosubset)
  (w,, Ww)
(subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

            
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
w: X
W'w: W' w
Wv: W v
Ww: W w
Q: (subtype_inc WC (v,, Wv) ≤ subtype_inc WC (w,, Ww))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc WD (v,, Wv)
   ≤ subtype_inc WD (w,, Ww))%tosubset
(subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

            
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
w: X
W'w: W' w
Wv: W v
Ww: W w
Q: (subtype_inc WC (v,, Wv) ≤ subtype_inc WC (w,, Ww))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc WD (v,, Wv)
   ≤ subtype_inc WD (w,, Ww))%tosubset
(subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) = subtype_inc WC (v,, Wv))%type
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
w: X
W'w: W' w
Wv: W v
Ww: W w
Q: (subtype_inc WC (v,, Wv) ≤ subtype_inc WC (w,, Ww))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc WD (v,, Wv)
   ≤ subtype_inc WD (w,, Ww))%tosubset
e: (subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) =
 subtype_inc WC (v,, Wv))%type
(subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

            
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
w: X
W'w: W' w
Wv: W v
Ww: W w
Q: (subtype_inc WC (v,, Wv) ≤ subtype_inc WC (w,, Ww))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc WD (v,, Wv)
   ≤ subtype_inc WD (w,, Ww))%tosubset
(subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) = subtype_inc WC (v,, Wv))%type
 now apply subtypePath_prop.

∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C

nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)

d: D

de: (W = upto d)%type

q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type

j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)

W'D: W' ⊆ D

 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type

 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
w: X
W'w: W' w
Wv: W v
Ww: W w
Q: (subtype_inc WC (v,, Wv) ≤ subtype_inc WC (w,, Ww))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc WD (v,, Wv)
   ≤ subtype_inc WD (w,, Ww))%tosubset
e: (subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) =
 subtype_inc WC (v,, Wv))%type
(subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

W'd: W' (pr1 d)

W'D: W' ⊆ D

⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C

gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D

nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)

nDW: D ⊈ W

d: D

q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type

j: W ⊆ W'

W'd: W' (pr1 d)

W'D: W' ⊆ D

 subtype_inc W'C v

 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type

 subtype_inc W'D v

W'v: W' v
w: X

Ww: W w

g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C

nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)

c: C

d: D

W'd: W' (pr1 d)

W'v: W' v
w: X

g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type

j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
w: X
W'w: W' w
Wv: W v
Ww: W w
Q: (subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v)
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc WD (v,, Wv)
   ≤ subtype_inc WD (w,, Ww))%tosubset
e: (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v) =
 subtype_inc WD (v,, Wv))%type
(subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

            
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
w: X
W'w: W' w
Wv: W v
Ww: W w
Q: (subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v)
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc WD (v,, Wv)
   ≤ subtype_inc WD (w,, Ww))%tosubset
(subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v) = subtype_inc WD (v,, Wv))%type
 now apply subtypePath_prop.

   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)

d: D

de: (W = upto d)%type

q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type

W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v

cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <

W'v: W' v
w: X

   ≤ subtype_inc WD (w,, Ww))%tosubset
(subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w) = subtype_inc WD (w,, Ww))%type

lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X

nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)

nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
w: X

Ww: W w
Q: (subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v)
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc WD (w,, Ww))%tosubset
e: (subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w) =
 subtype_inc WD (w,, Ww))%type
(subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

            
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
w: X
W'w: W' w
Wv: W v
Ww: W w
Q: (subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v)
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc WD (w,, Ww))%tosubset
(subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w) = subtype_inc WD (w,, Ww))%type
 now apply subtypePath_prop.

g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C

nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type

q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type

W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type

 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <

W'v: W' v
w: X

Wv: W v
Ww: W w
Q: (subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v)
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc WD (w,, Ww))%tosubset
e: (subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w) =
 subtype_inc WD (w,, Ww))%type
(subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

            
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
w: X
W'w: W' w
Wv: W v
Ww: W w
Q: (subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v)
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset
(subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

            exact Q.
          
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
w: X
W'w: W' w
Wv: W v
Ew: (pr1 c = w)%type
(subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
W'w: W' (pr1 c)
Wv: W v
(subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v)
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'w))%tosubset
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
W'w: W' (pr1 c)
Wv: W v
(subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v)
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'w))%tosubset

C: WOSubset X

c: C

d: D

q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type

j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)

W'D: W' ⊆ D

 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
W'w: W' (pr1 c)

 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'w))%tosubset

g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,

lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D

WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D

WDi: sub_initial WD

nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)

nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type

q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type

j: W ⊆ W'

W'd: W' (pr1 d)

 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type

 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type

Wv: W v
(subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v)
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'w))%tosubset
 apply cmax.

X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 d = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 d): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c, W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 d,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 d,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
W'w: W' (pr1 d)
Wv: W v
(subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'w))%tosubset
 apply dmax.
        
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
v: X
W'v: W' v
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ev: (pr1 c = v)%type
(subtype_inc W'C (v,, W'v) ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (v,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
(subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'v)
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
(subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'v)
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ew: (pr1 c = w)%type
(subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'v)
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)

d: D

de: (W = upto d)%type

q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type

W'd: W' (pr1 d)

W'D: W' ⊆ D

 subtype_inc W'C v

cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v

dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X

 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C

nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type

j: W ⊆ W'

W'd: W' (pr1 d)

W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
¬ (subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
¬ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

            
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
¬ (subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
Q: subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j (w,, Ww)) <
subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'v)
¬ (subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
Q: ¬ (subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j (w,, Ww)))
¬ (subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset

              
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
Q: ¬ (subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j (w,, Ww)))
(w,, W'w = subtype_inc j (w,, Ww))%type
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
Q: ¬ (subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j (w,, Ww)))
e: (w,, W'w = subtype_inc j (w,, Ww))%type
¬ (subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset

              
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
Q: ¬ (subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j (w,, Ww)))
(w,, W'w = subtype_inc j (w,, Ww))%type
 now apply subtypePath_prop. 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
Q: ¬ (subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j (w,, Ww)))
e: (w,, W'w = subtype_inc j (w,, Ww))%type
¬ (subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset

              
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
Q: ¬ (subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))
¬ (subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset

              exact Q.
            
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
¬ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
Q: subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j (w,, Ww)) <
subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd)
¬ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
Q: ¬ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j (w,, Ww)))
¬ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

              
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
Q: ¬ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j (w,, Ww)))
(w,, W'w = subtype_inc j (w,, Ww))%type
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
Q: ¬ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j (w,, Ww)))
e: (w,, W'w = subtype_inc j (w,, Ww))%type
¬ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

              
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
Q: ¬ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j (w,, Ww)))
(w,, W'w = subtype_inc j (w,, Ww))%type
 now apply subtypePath_prop. 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
Q: ¬ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j (w,, Ww)))
e: (w,, W'w = subtype_inc j (w,, Ww))%type
¬ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

              
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
Q: ¬ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))
¬ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

              
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
Q: ¬ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))
(subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'v) =
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
Q: ¬ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))
e: (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'v) =
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
¬ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

              
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
Q: ¬ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))
(subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'v) =
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
 now apply subtypePath_prop.

∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X

WC: W ⊆ C

nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D

de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type

j: W ⊆ W'

W'd: W' (pr1 d)

W'D: W' ⊆ D

 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
Q: ¬ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))
e: (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'v) =
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
¬ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

              
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ww: W w
Q: ¬ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))
¬ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset

              exact Q.
          
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v: W' (pr1 c)
w: X
W'w: W' w
Ew: (pr1 c = w)%type
(subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'v)
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (w,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (w,, W'w))%tosubset
 
X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type
W':= subtype_plus W (pr1 c): hsubtype X
j: W ⊆ W'
W'c: W' (pr1 c)
W'd: W' (pr1 d)
W'C: W' ⊆ C
W'D: W' ⊆ D
cmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
cmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'c : W' (pr1 c)),
 subtype_inc W'C (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'c))%type
dmax: (∏ (v : W') (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D v
 ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
dmax': (∏ (w : W) (W'd : W' (pr1 d)),
 subtype_inc W'D (subtype_inc j w) <
 subtype_inc W'D (pr1 d,, W'd))%type
W'v, W'w: W' (pr1 c)
(subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'v)
 ≤ subtype_inc W'C (pr1 c,, W'w))%tosubset
⇔ (subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'v)
   ≤ subtype_inc W'D (pr1 c,, W'w))%tosubset
 apply logeq_if_both_true ; now use TOeq_to_refl_1. }

d: D

W'd: W' (pr1 d)

hfalse

d: D

de: (W = upto d)%type

X: hSet
g: ∏ S : proper_subtypes_set X,
∑ x : X, hProp_to_hSet (¬ pr1 S x)
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D

WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D

nc: ¬ (W ≡ C)
nd: ¬ (W ≡ D)
nCW: C ⊈ W
nDW: D ⊈ W
c: C
cE: W ≡ upto c
d: D
dE: W ≡ upto d
ce: (W = upto c)%type
de: (W = upto d)%type
cd: (upto c = upto d)%type
p: (pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))%type
q: (pr1 d = pr1 (g (upto' d)))%type
cd1: (pr1 c = pr1 d)%type

j: W ⊆ W'
