W'd: W' (pr1 d)
ci: common_initial W' C D
K: W' ⊆ W
Wc: W (pr1 c)
Cc: C (pr1 c)
(c = pr1 c,, Cc)%type

    now apply subtypePath_prop. 
X: hSet
g: choice_fun X
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
E: W ≡ C ∨ W ≡ D
wosub_comparable (C,, gC) (D,, gD)

  
X: hSet
g: choice_fun X
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
E: W ≡ C ∨ W ≡ D
wosub_comparable C D
 
X: hSet
g: choice_fun X
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
E: W ≡ C ∨ W ≡ D
C ≼ D ∨ D ≼ C

  
X: hSet
g: choice_fun X
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
E: (W ≡ C) ⨿ (W ≡ D)
C ≼ D ∨ D ≼ C
 
X: hSet
g: choice_fun X
lem: LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: is_guided_WOSubset g C
D: WOSubset X
gD: is_guided_WOSubset g D
W:= max_common_initial C D: hsubtype X
WC: W ⊆ C
WD: W ⊆ D
WCi: sub_initial WC
WDi: sub_initial WD
WCD: same_induced_ordering WC WD
E: (W ≡ C) ⨿ (W ≡ D)
(C ≼ D) ⨿ (D ≼ C)

  
X: hSet
g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g C)
D: WOSubset X
gD: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g D)
W:= max_common_initial (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
  (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D): hsubtype (pr1hSet X)
WC: hProptoType
  (W
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
WD: hProptoType
  (W
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
WCi: hProptoType (sub_initial WC)
WDi: hProptoType (sub_initial WD)
WCD: hProptoType (same_induced_ordering WC WD)
E: hProptoType
  (W
   ≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
⨿ hProptoType
    (W
     ≡ TOSubset_to_subtype
         (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
hProptoType (C ≼ D) ⨿ hProptoType (D ≼ C)

  
X: hSet
g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g C)
D: WOSubset X
gD: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g D)
W:= max_common_initial (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
  (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D): hsubtype (pr1hSet X)
WC: hProptoType
  (W
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
WD: hProptoType
  (W
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
WCi: hProptoType (sub_initial WC)
WDi: hProptoType (sub_initial WD)
WCD: hProptoType (same_induced_ordering WC WD)
eWC: hProptoType (W ≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
hProptoType (C ≼ D) ⨿ hProptoType (D ≼ C)

   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))

eWD: hProptoType (W ≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))

  (max_common_initial (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)

   (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D) =
 TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))%type
hProptoType (C ≼ D)

g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM

gC: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g C)

gD: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g D)

  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
WD: hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
WCi: hProptoType (sub_initial WC)
WDi: hProptoType (sub_initial WD)
WCD: hProptoType (same_induced_ordering WC WD)
eWC: hProptoType
(TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
(λ x : hProptoType
         (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
          ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype
              (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)),
 hProptoType
   ((λ le : hProptoType
              (TOSubset_to_subtype
                 (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
               ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype
                   (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)),
     tosub_order_compat le ∧ sub_initial le) x)) ?pr1

  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
 exact WD.

X: hSet
g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g C)
D: WOSubset X
gD: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g D)
WC: hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
WD: hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
WCi: hProptoType (sub_initial WC)
WDi: hProptoType (sub_initial WD)
WCD: hProptoType (same_induced_ordering WC WD)
eWC: hProptoType
(TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
x, y: carrier
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
le: hProptoType (x ≤ y)%tosubset
hProptoType
  (subtype_inc WD x ≤ subtype_inc WD y)%tosubset
 
X: hSet
g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g C)
D: WOSubset X
gD: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g D)
WC: hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
WD: hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
WCi: hProptoType (sub_initial WC)
WDi: hProptoType (sub_initial WD)
WCD: hProptoType (same_induced_ordering WC WD)
eWC: hProptoType
(TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
x, y: carrier
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
le: hProptoType (x ≤ y)%tosubset
hProptoType
  (subtype_inc WC x ≤ subtype_inc WC y)%tosubset
 now apply (h1'' le).

g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM

    exact WDi.
  
X: hSet
g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g C)
D: WOSubset X
gD: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g D)
W:= max_common_initial (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
  (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D): hsubtype (pr1hSet X)
WC: hProptoType
  (W
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
WD: hProptoType
  (W
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
WCi: hProptoType (sub_initial WC)
WDi: hProptoType (sub_initial WD)
WCD: hProptoType (same_induced_ordering WC WD)
eWD: hProptoType (W ≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
hProptoType (C ≼ D) ⨿ hProptoType (D ≼ C)
 
X: hSet
g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g C)
D: WOSubset X
gD: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g D)
W:= max_common_initial (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
  (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D): hsubtype (pr1hSet X)
WC: hProptoType
  (W
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
WD: hProptoType
  (W
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
WCi: hProptoType (sub_initial WC)
WDi: hProptoType (sub_initial WD)
WCD: hProptoType (same_induced_ordering WC WD)
eWD: hProptoType (W ≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
hProptoType (D ≼ C)

    
X: hSet
g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g C)
D: WOSubset X
gD: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g D)
W:= max_common_initial (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
  (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D): hsubtype (pr1hSet X)
WC: hProptoType
  (W
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
WD: hProptoType
  (W
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
WCi: hProptoType (sub_initial WC)
WDi: hProptoType (sub_initial WD)
WCD: hProptoType (same_induced_ordering WC WD)
eWD: hProptoType (W ≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
(W = TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))%type
X: hSet
g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g C)
D: WOSubset X
gD: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g D)
W:= max_common_initial (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
  (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D): hsubtype (pr1hSet X)
WC: hProptoType
  (W
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
WD: hProptoType
  (W
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
WCi: hProptoType (sub_initial WC)
WDi: hProptoType (sub_initial WD)
WCD: hProptoType (same_induced_ordering WC WD)
eWD: hProptoType (W ≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
e: (W = TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))%type
hProptoType (D ≼ C)

    
X: hSet
g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g C)
D: WOSubset X
gD: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g D)
W:= max_common_initial (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
  (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D): hsubtype (pr1hSet X)
WC: hProptoType
  (W
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
WD: hProptoType
  (W
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
WCi: hProptoType (sub_initial WC)
WDi: hProptoType (sub_initial WD)
WCD: hProptoType (same_induced_ordering WC WD)
eWD: hProptoType (W ≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
(W = TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))%type
 now apply hsubtype_univalence. 
X: hSet
g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g C)
D: WOSubset X
gD: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g D)

  (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D): hsubtype (pr1hSet X)

  (W
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
WD: hProptoType
  (W
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))

WDi: hProptoType (sub_initial WD)
WCD: hProptoType (same_induced_ordering WC WD)
eWD: hProptoType (W ≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
e: (W = TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))%type
hProptoType (D ≼ C)

    
X: hSet
g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g C)
D: WOSubset X
gD: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g D)
W:= max_common_initial (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
  (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D): hsubtype (pr1hSet X)
WC: hProptoType
  (max_common_initial (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
     (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
WD: hProptoType
  (max_common_initial (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
     (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
WCi: hProptoType (sub_initial WC)
WDi: hProptoType (sub_initial WD)
WCD: hProptoType (same_induced_ordering WC WD)
eWD: hProptoType
(max_common_initial (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C) (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
e: (max_common_initial (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
   (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D) =
 TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))%type
hProptoType (D ≼ C)

g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM

gC: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g C)

(max_common_initial (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C) (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
e: (max_common_initial (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)
   (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D) =
 TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))%type
hProptoType (D ≼ C)

  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)

(TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
hProptoType (D ≼ C)

    
X: hSet
g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g C)
D: WOSubset X
gD: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g D)
WC: hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
WD: hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
WCi: hProptoType (sub_initial WC)
WDi: hProptoType (sub_initial WD)
WCD: hProptoType (same_induced_ordering WC WD)
eWD: hProptoType
(TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
X: hSet
g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g C)
D: WOSubset X
gD: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g D)
WC: hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
WD: hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
WCi: hProptoType (sub_initial WC)
WDi: hProptoType (sub_initial WD)
WCD: hProptoType (same_induced_ordering WC WD)
eWD: hProptoType
(TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
(λ x : hProptoType
         (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
          ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype
              (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)),
 hProptoType
   ((λ le : hProptoType
              (TOSubset_to_subtype
                 (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
               ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype
                   (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)),
     tosub_order_compat le ∧ sub_initial le) x)) ?pr1

    
X: hSet
g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g C)
D: WOSubset X
gD: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g D)
WC: hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
WD: hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
WCi: hProptoType (sub_initial WC)
WDi: hProptoType (sub_initial WD)
WCD: hProptoType (same_induced_ordering WC WD)
eWD: hProptoType
(TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
 exact WC. 
X: hSet
g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g C)
D: WOSubset X
gD: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g D)
WC: hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
WD: hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
WCi: hProptoType (sub_initial WC)
WDi: hProptoType (sub_initial WD)
WCD: hProptoType (same_induced_ordering WC WD)
eWD: hProptoType
(TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
(λ x : hProptoType
         (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
          ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype
              (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)),
 hProptoType
   ((λ le : hProptoType
              (TOSubset_to_subtype
                 (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
               ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype
                   (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C)),
     tosub_order_compat le ∧ sub_initial le) x)) WC

    
X: hSet
g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g C)
D: WOSubset X
gD: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g D)

  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))

  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))

WCD: hProptoType (same_induced_ordering WC WD)
eWD: hProptoType
(TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
hProptoType (tosub_order_compat WC)
X: hSet
g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g C)
D: WOSubset X
gD: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g D)

  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
WD: hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
WCi: hProptoType (sub_initial WC)

(TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)

X: hSet
g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g C)
D: WOSubset X
gD: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g D)
WC: hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
WD: hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
WCi: hProptoType (sub_initial WC)
WDi: hProptoType (sub_initial WD)
WCD: hProptoType (same_induced_ordering WC WD)
eWD: hProptoType
(TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
hProptoType (tosub_order_compat WC)
 
X: hSet
g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g C)
D: WOSubset X
gD: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g D)
WC: hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
WD: hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
WCi: hProptoType (sub_initial WC)
WDi: hProptoType (sub_initial WD)
WCD: hProptoType (same_induced_ordering WC WD)
eWD: hProptoType
(TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
x, y: carrier
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
le: hProptoType (x ≤ y)%tosubset
hProptoType
  (subtype_inc WC x ≤ subtype_inc WC y)%tosubset
 
X: hSet
g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g C)
D: WOSubset X
gD: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g D)
WC: hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
WD: hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
WCi: hProptoType (sub_initial WC)
WDi: hProptoType (sub_initial WD)
WCD: hProptoType (same_induced_ordering WC WD)
eWD: hProptoType
(TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
x, y: carrier
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
le: hProptoType (x ≤ y)%tosubset
hProptoType
  (subtype_inc WD x ≤ subtype_inc WD y)%tosubset
 now apply (h1'' le). 
X: hSet
g: pr1hSet (choice_fun X)
lem: hProptoType LEM
C: WOSubset X
gC: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g C)
D: WOSubset X
gD: hProptoType (is_guided_WOSubset g D)
WC: hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset C))
WD: hProptoType
  (TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
   ⊆ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
WCi: hProptoType (sub_initial WC)
WDi: hProptoType (sub_initial WD)
WCD: hProptoType (same_induced_ordering WC WD)
eWD: hProptoType
(TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D)
≡ TOSubset_to_subtype (WOSubset_to_TOSubset D))
hProptoType (sub_initial WC)

    exact WCi.
  Unset Printing Coercions.
Defined.

(** ** The proof of the well ordering theorem of Zermelo *)


X: hSet
AxiomOfChoice ⇒ (∃ R : hrel X, isWellOrder R)

(* see http://www.math.illinois.edu/~dan/ShortProofs/WellOrdering.pdf *)

X: hSet
AxiomOfChoice ⇒ (∃ R : hrel X, isWellOrder R)

  
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
∃ R : hrel X, isWellOrder R
 
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
∃ R : hrel X, isWellOrder R

  (* a choice function g allows us to single out the "guided" well ordered subsets of X *)
  
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
∃ R : hrel X, isWellOrder R

  
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
∃ R : hrel X, isWellOrder R

  
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
∃ R : hrel X, isWellOrder R

  (* we form the union, W, of all the guided (well ordered) subsets of X *)
  
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
∃ R : hrel X, isWellOrder R

  (* we show W itself is guided, so W is the biggest guided subset of X *)
  
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
is_guided_WOSubset g W
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
∃ R : hrel X, isWellOrder R

  
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
is_guided_WOSubset g W
 
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
w: X
Ww: W w
pr1 (w,, Ww) = pr1 (g (upto' (w,, Ww)))
 
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
w: X
Ww: W w
C: Guided_WOSubset g
Cw: C w
pr1 (w,, Ww) = pr1 (g (upto' (w,, Ww)))

    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
w: X
Ww: W w
C: Guided_WOSubset g
Cw: C w
pr1 (w,, Ww) = pr1 (g (upto' (w,, Ww)))
 
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
w: X
Ww: W w
C: Guided_WOSubset g
Cw: C w
(w = pr1 (g (upto' (w,, Ww))))%type

    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
w: X
Ww: W w
C: Guided_WOSubset g
Cw: C w
Q: (w = pr1 (g (upto' (w,, Cw))))%type
(w = pr1 (g (upto' (w,, Ww))))%type

    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
w: X
Ww: W w
C: Guided_WOSubset g
Cw: C w
(pr1 (g (upto' (w,, Cw))) = pr1 (g (upto' (w,, Ww))))%type

    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
w: X
Ww: W w
C: Guided_WOSubset g
Cw: C w
CW: C ≼ W
(pr1 (g (upto' (w,, Cw))) = pr1 (g (upto' (w,, Ww))))%type

    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
w: X
Ww: W w
C: Guided_WOSubset g
Cw: C w
CW: C ≼ W
pr1 C ≼ W
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
w: X
Ww: W w
C: Guided_WOSubset g
Cw: C w
CW: C ≼ W
(pr1 (subtype_inc (pr1 ?j) (w,, Cw)) = pr1 (w,, Ww))%type

    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
w: X
Ww: W w
C: Guided_WOSubset g
Cw: C w
CW: C ≼ W
pr1 C ≼ W
 exact CW.
    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
w: X
Ww: W w
C: Guided_WOSubset g
Cw: C w
CW: C ≼ W
(pr1 (subtype_inc (pr1 CW) (w,, Cw)) = pr1 (w,, Ww))%type
 reflexivity. 
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
∃ R : hrel X, isWellOrder R

  (* now we prove W is all of X *)
  
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
∀ x : X, W x
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
all: ∀ x : X, W x
∃ R : hrel X, isWellOrder R

  
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
∀ x : X, W x

    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
n: ¬ (∀ x : X, W x)
∅

    (* it's not constructive to get an element not in W: *)
    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
∅

    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
hfalse

    (* zn is the guided element not in W: *)
    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
hfalse

    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
hfalse

    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
hfalse

    (* make a larger well ordered subset of X by appending z to the top of W *)
    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
hfalse

    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
hfalse

    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
hfalse

    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
hfalse

    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
is_guided_WOSubset g W'
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'guided: is_guided_WOSubset g W'
hfalse

    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
is_guided_WOSubset g W'
 
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
∀ c : W', pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c))

      
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
x: X
W'x: W' x
pr1 (x,, W'x) = pr1 (g (upto' (x,, W'x)))

      
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
x: X
W'x: W' x
x = pr1 (g (upto' (x,, W'x)))

      
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
x: X
W'x: W' x
Wx: W x
x = pr1 (g (upto' (x,, W'x)))
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
x: X
W'x: W' x
ezx: (z = x)%type
x = pr1 (g (upto' (x,, W'x)))

      
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
x: X
W'x: W' x
Wx: W x
x = pr1 (g (upto' (x,, W'x)))
 
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
x: X
W'x: W' x
Wx: W x
x_guided: (λ c : W, pr1 c = pr1 (g (upto' c)))
  (x,, Wx)
x = pr1 (g (upto' (x,, W'x)))

        
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
x: X
W'x: W' x
Wx: W x
x_guided: (x = pr1 (g (upto' (x,, Wx))))%type
x = pr1 (g (upto' (x,, W'x)))

        
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
x: X
W'x: W' x
Wx: W x
(pr1 (g (upto' (x,, Wx))) = pr1 (g (upto' (x,, W'x))))%type

        
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
x: X
W'x: W' x
Wx: W x
W ≼ W'
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
x: X
W'x: W' x
Wx: W x
(pr1 (subtype_inc (pr1 ?j) (x,, Wx)) = pr1 (x,, W'x))%type

ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM

z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X

X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
x: X
W'x: W' x
Wx: W x
WW': (W ≼ TOSubset_plus_point W z nWz)%tosubset
W ≼ W'

          
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
x: X
W'x: W' x
Wx: W x
WW': W ⊆ TOSubset_plus_point W z nWz
comp: tosub_order_compat WW'
W ≼ W'

          
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
x: X
W'x: W' x
Wx: W x
WW': W ⊆ TOSubset_plus_point W z nWz
comp: tosub_order_compat WW'
tosub_order_compat WW' ∧ sub_initial WW'

X: hSet

lem: LEM

z:= pr1 znW: X

WW': W ⊆ TOSubset_plus_point W z nWz
comp: tosub_order_compat WW'
tosub_order_compat WW'
 exact comp.
          
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X

z:= pr1 znW: X

W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z

X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
x: X
W'x: W' x
Wx: W x
WW': W ⊆ TOSubset_plus_point W z nWz
comp: tosub_order_compat WW'
w, w': X
Ww: W w
W'w': W' w'
le: (w',, W'w' ≤ w,, WW' w Ww)%tosubset
W w'

            
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
x: X
W'x: W' x
Wx: W x
WW': W ⊆ TOSubset_plus_point W z nWz
comp: tosub_order_compat WW'
w, w': X
Ww: W w
W'w': W' w'
le: (w',, W'w' ≤ w,, WW' w Ww)%tosubset
(w',, W'w' ≤ w,, TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz w Ww)%tosubset

            now apply (h1'' le).
        
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
x: X
W'x: W' x
Wx: W x
(pr1
   (subtype_inc
      (pr1
         (let WW' := TOSubset_plus_point_le W z nWz in
          (λ (WW'0 : W ⊆ TOSubset_plus_point W z nWz)
           (comp : tosub_order_compat WW'0),
           WW'0,,
           comp,,
           ((λ w : X,
             (λ w' : X,
              (λ Ww : W w,
               (λ ..., ...)
               :
               ∀ Tt : ..., ...%tosubset ⇒ ...)
              :
              ∀ (Ss : W w) (Tt : W' w'),
              (w',, Tt ≤ w,, ...)%tosubset ⇒ W w')
             :
             ∀ (t : X) (Ss : W w) (Tt : W' t),
             (t,, Tt ≤ w,, WW'0 w Ss)%tosubset ⇒ W t)
            :
            sub_initial WW'0)) (pr1 WW') (pr2 WW')))
      (x,, Wx)) = pr1 (x,, W'x))%type
 reflexivity.
      
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
x: X
W'x: W' x
ezx: (z = x)%type
x = pr1 (g (upto' (x,, W'x)))

lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X

z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z

W'x: W' z

X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X

W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X

z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z

jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'x: W' z
(pr1 (g (pr1 W,, Q)) = pr1 (g (upto' (z,, W'x))))%type

        
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X

W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X

z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z

W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'x: W' z
(pr1 W,, Q = upto' (z,, W'x))%type
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X

Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x

z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'x: W' z
e: (pr1 W,, Q = upto' (z,, W'x))%type
(pr1 (g (pr1 W,, Q)) = pr1 (g (upto' (z,, W'x))))%type

X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X

Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x

z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z

W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'x: W' z
y: X
pr1 (pr1 W,, Q) y ⇔ pr1 (upto' (z,, W'x)) y

          
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'x: W' z
y: X
W y ⇔ upto (z,, W'x) y

          
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'x: W' z
y: X
W y ⇒ upto (z,, W'x) y
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'x: W' z
y: X
upto (z,, W'x) y ⇒ W y

          
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X

Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'

y: X
W y ⇒ upto (z,, W'x) y
 
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'x: W' z
y: X
Wy: W y
upto (z,, W'x) y

            (* show that the element y in W is less than z *)
            
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'x: W' z
y: X
Wy: W y
y,, j y Wy < z,, W'x
 
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'x: W' z
y: X
Wy: W y
¬ (z,, W'x ≤ y,, j y Wy)
 
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'x: W' z
y: X
Wy: W y
le: z,, W'x ≤ y,, j y Wy
∅

            
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
y: X
Wy: W y
le: z,, hinhpr (inr (idpath z)) ≤ y,, j y Wy
∅

            
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
y: X
Wy: W y
le: ∅
∅

            exact le.
          
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'x: W' z
y: X
upto (z,, W'x) y ⇒ W y
 
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'x: W' z
y: X
W'y: W' y
yz: y,, W'y < z,, W'x
W y

            (* show that if y in W' is less than z, then it's in W *)
            
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'x: W' z
y: X
W'y: W' y
yz: y,, W'y < z,, W'x
Wy: W y
W y
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'x: W' z
y: X
W'y: W' y
yz: y,, W'y < z,, W'x
ezy: (z = y)%type
W y

            
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'x: W' z
y: X
W'y: W' y
yz: y,, W'y < z,, W'x
Wy: W y
W y
 exact Wy.         (* it was in W, anyway *)
            
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X

Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'x: W' z
y: X
W'y: W' y
yz: y,, W'y < z,, W'x
ezy: (z = y)%type
W y

ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X

Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'x, W'y: W' z
yz: z,, W'y < z,, W'x
W z

              
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'x, W'y: W' z
yz: z,, W'y < z,, W'x
∅
 
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'x, W'y: W' z
yz: make_hProp (neg (z,, W'x ≤ z,, W'y))
  (isapropneg (z,, W'x ≤ z,, W'y))
∅
 
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'x, W'y: W' z
yz: make_hProp (neg (z,, W'x ≤ z,, W'y))
  (isapropneg (z,, W'x ≤ z,, W'y))
z,, W'x ≤ z,, W'y

              
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'y: W' z
yz: make_hProp (neg (z,, W'y ≤ z,, W'y))
  (isapropneg (z,, W'y ≤ z,, W'y))
z,, W'y ≤ z,, W'y

              exact (TOrefl W' (z,, W'y)). 
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'x: W' z
e: (pr1 W,, Q = upto' (z,, W'x))%type
(pr1 (g (pr1 W,, Q)) = pr1 (g (upto' (z,, W'x))))%type

        now induction e. 
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'guided: is_guided_WOSubset g W'
hfalse

    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'guided: is_guided_WOSubset g W'
W'W: W' ≼ W
hfalse

    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
Q: ∃ x : X, ¬ W x
znW:= g (pr1 W,, Q) : ∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z: (∑ z : X, ¬ pr1 W z)%type
z:= pr1 znW: X
nWz:= pr2 znW : ¬ pr1 W z: ¬ pr1 W z
W':= WOSubset_plus_point W z nWz lem: WOSubset X
W'z: W' z
j:= TOSubset_plus_point_incl W z nWz : W ⊆ W': W ⊆ W'
jmap:= subtype_inc j: W → W'
W'guided: is_guided_WOSubset g W'
W'W: W' ≼ W
K: W z
hfalse

    exact (nWz K).
    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
Wguided: is_guided_WOSubset g W
all: ∀ x : X, W x
∃ R : hrel X, isWellOrder R

  
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
all: ∀ x : X, W x
∃ R : hrel X, isWellOrder R

  
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W:= ⋃ Schain: WOSubset X
all: ∀ x : X, W x
(∑ R : hrel X, isWellOrder R)%type

  
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W: subtype_set X
R': WellOrdering (∑ y, W y)%subset
all: ∀ x : X, (W,, R') x
(∑ R : hrel X, isWellOrder R)%type

  
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W: subtype_set X
R': WellOrdering (∑ y, W y)%subset
all: (∏ x : X, W x)%type
(∑ R : hrel X, isWellOrder R)%type

  
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W: subtype_set X
R': WellOrdering (∑ y, W y)%subset
all: (∏ x : X, W x)%type
WellOrdering X

  
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W: subtype_set X
R': WellOrdering (∑ y, W y)%subset
all: (∏ x : X, W x)%type
(X = (∑ y, W y)%subset)%type
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W: subtype_set X
R': WellOrdering (∑ y, W y)%subset
all: (∏ x : X, W x)%type
e: (X = (∑ y, W y)%subset)%type
WellOrdering X

  
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W: subtype_set X
R': WellOrdering (∑ y, W y)%subset
all: (∏ x : X, W x)%type
(X = (∑ y, W y)%subset)%type
 
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W: subtype_set X
R': WellOrdering (∑ y, W y)%subset
all: (∏ x : X, W x)%type
X ≃ (∑ y, W y)%subset
 
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W: subtype_set X
R': WellOrdering (∑ y, W y)%subset
all: (∏ x : X, W x)%type
(∑ y, W y)%subset ≃ X
 
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W: subtype_set X
R': WellOrdering (∑ y, W y)%subset
all: (∏ x : X, W x)%type
(∏ z : X, iscontr (W z))%type

    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W: subtype_set X
R': WellOrdering (∑ y, W y)%subset
all: (∏ x : X, W x)%type
x: X
iscontr (W x)

    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W: subtype_set X
R': WellOrdering (∑ y, W y)%subset
all: (∏ x : X, W x)%type
x: X
iscontr (W x)

    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W: subtype_set X
R': WellOrdering (∑ y, W y)%subset
all: (∏ x : X, W x)%type
x: X
isaprop (W x)
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W: subtype_set X
R': WellOrdering (∑ y, W y)%subset
all: (∏ x : X, W x)%type
x: X
W x

    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W: subtype_set X
R': WellOrdering (∑ y, W y)%subset
all: (∏ x : X, W x)%type
x: X
isaprop (W x)
 apply propproperty.
    
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W: subtype_set X
R': WellOrdering (∑ y, W y)%subset
all: (∏ x : X, W x)%type
x: X
W x
 apply all. 
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W: subtype_set X
R': WellOrdering (∑ y, W y)%subset
all: (∏ x : X, W x)%type
e: (X = (∑ y, W y)%subset)%type
WellOrdering X

  
X: hSet
ac: AxiomOfChoice
lem: LEM
g: choice_fun X
S:= guidedFamily g: Guided_WOSubset g → WOSubset X
Schain:= guided_WOSubset_total g lem: is_wosubset_chain (guidedFamily g)
W: subtype_set X
R': WellOrdering X
all: (∏ x : X, W x)%type
WellOrdering X
 exact R'.
Defined.

(** ** Well ordered sets *)

Definition WellOrderedSet : UU := (∑ (S:hSet), WellOrdering S)%type.

Definition WellOrderedSet_to_hSet : WellOrderedSet -> hSet := pr1.

Coercion WellOrderedSet_to_hSet : WellOrderedSet >-> hSet.

Declare Scope woset.
Delimit Scope woset with woset.

Local Open Scope woset.

Definition WOrel (X:WellOrderedSet) : hrel X := pr12 X.

Notation "x ≤ y" := (WOrel _ x y) : woset.

Definition WOlt {X:WellOrderedSet} (x y : X) := ¬ (y ≤ x).

Notation "x < y" := (WOlt x y) : woset.


X: hSet
R: hrel X
total: isTotalOrder R
S: hsubtype X
isaprop
  (∑ s : X,
   hProp_to_hSet (S s ∧ (∀ t : X, S t ⇒ R s t)))


X: hSet
R: hrel X
total: isTotalOrder R
S: hsubtype X
isaprop
  (∑ s : X,
   hProp_to_hSet (S s ∧ (∀ t : X, S t ⇒ R s t)))

  
X: hSet
R: hrel X
po: ispreorder R
anti: isantisymm R
tot: istotal R
S: hsubtype X
isaprop
  (∑ s : X,
   hProp_to_hSet (S s ∧ (∀ t : X, S t ⇒ R s t)))

  
X: hSet
R: hrel X
po: ispreorder R
anti: isantisymm R
tot: istotal R
S: hsubtype X
s, t: ∑ s : X,
hProp_to_hSet (S s ∧ (∀ t : X, S t ⇒ R s t))
(s = t)%type
 
X: hSet
R: hrel X
po: ispreorder R
anti: isantisymm R
tot: istotal R
S: hsubtype X
s, t: ∑ s : X,
hProp_to_hSet (S s ∧ (∀ t : X, S t ⇒ R s t))
(pr1 s = pr1 t)%type

  
X: hSet
R: hrel X
po: ispreorder R
anti: isantisymm R
tot: istotal R
S: hsubtype X
x: X
I: S x
i: ∀ t : X, S t ⇒ R x t
y: X
J: S y
j: ∀ t : X, S t ⇒ R y t
(pr1 (x,, I,, i) = pr1 (y,, J,, j))%type

x = y

 exact (j x I). }

 exact c. } }
Defined.

(** Accessor functions *)

Definition WO_isTotalOrder (X : WellOrderedSet) : isTotalOrder (WOrel X) := pr122 X.

Definition WO_isrefl (X : WellOrderedSet) : isrefl (WOrel X) := pr211 (WO_isTotalOrder X).

Definition WO_istrans (X : WellOrderedSet) : istrans (WOrel X) := pr111 (WO_isTotalOrder X).

Definition WO_istotal (X : WellOrderedSet) : istotal (WOrel X) := pr2 (WO_isTotalOrder X).

Definition WO_isantisymm (X : WellOrderedSet) : isantisymm (WOrel X) := pr21 (WO_isTotalOrder X).

Definition WO_hasSmallest (X : WellOrderedSet) : hasSmallest (WOrel X) := pr222 X.

(** Lemmas about WOlt *)


X: WellOrderedSet
istrans WOlt


X: WellOrderedSet
istrans WOlt


X: WellOrderedSet
x, y, z: X
H1: neg (y ≤ x)
H2: neg (z ≤ y)
H3: z ≤ x
∅


X: WellOrderedSet
x, y, z: X
H1: neg (y ≤ x)
H2: neg (z ≤ y)
H3: z ≤ x
H: y ≤ z
∅
X: WellOrderedSet
x, y, z: X
H1: neg (y ≤ x)
H2: neg (z ≤ y)
H3: z ≤ x
H: z ≤ y
∅


X: WellOrderedSet
x, y, z: X
H1: neg (y ≤ x)
H2: neg (z ≤ y)
H3: z ≤ x
H: y ≤ z
∅
 now apply H1, (WO_istrans X y z x H H3).

X: WellOrderedSet
x, y, z: X
H1: neg (y ≤ x)
H2: neg (z ≤ y)
H3: z ≤ x
H: z ≤ y
∅
 now apply H2.
Qed.


X: WellOrderedSet
isirrefl WOlt


X: WellOrderedSet
isirrefl WOlt

now intros x; simpl; intros H; apply H, WO_isrefl.
Qed.

(** Equivalent definition (assuming decidable equality) of the WOlt relation *)

X: WellOrderedSet
x, y: X
hProp


X: WellOrderedSet
x, y: X
hProp


X: WellOrderedSet
x, y: X
isaprop (x ≤ y × x != y)%type

abstract (now apply isapropdirprod; [ apply propproperty | apply isapropneg ]).
Defined.


X: WellOrderedSet
x, y: X
WOlt' X x y → x < y


X: WellOrderedSet
x, y: X
WOlt' X x y → x < y


X: WellOrderedSet
x, y: X
H1: x ≤ y
H2: (x != y)%type
H3: y ≤ x
∅

now use H2; apply (WO_isantisymm X x y H1 H3).
Qed.

(** One direction of the equivalence requires decidable equality *)

X: WellOrderedSet
hX: isdeceq X
x, y: X
x < y → WOlt' X x y


X: WellOrderedSet
hX: isdeceq X
x, y: X
x < y → WOlt' X x y


X: WellOrderedSet
hX: isdeceq X
x, y: X
H: x < y
WOlt' X x y


X: WellOrderedSet
hX: isdeceq X
x, y: X
H: x < y
Hle: x ≤ y
(x ≤ y × x != y)%type
X: WellOrderedSet
hX: isdeceq X
x, y: X
H: x < y
Hle: y ≤ x
(x ≤ y × x != y)%type


X: WellOrderedSet
hX: isdeceq X
x, y: X
H: x < y
Hle: x ≤ y
(x ≤ y × x != y)%type
 
X: WellOrderedSet
hX: isdeceq X
x, y: X
H: x < y
Hle: x ≤ y
Heq: (x = y)%type
(x ≤ y × x != y)%type
X: WellOrderedSet
hX: isdeceq X
x, y: X
H: x < y
Hle: x ≤ y
Hneq: (x != y)%type
(x ≤ y × x != y)%type

  
X: WellOrderedSet
hX: isdeceq X
x, y: X
H: x < y
Hle: x ≤ y
Heq: (x = y)%type
(x ≤ y × x != y)%type
 
X: WellOrderedSet
hX: isdeceq X
x, y: X
H: y < y
Hle: x ≤ y
Heq: (x = y)%type
(x ≤ y × x != y)%type

    induction (WOlt_isirrefl _ _ H).
  
X: WellOrderedSet
hX: isdeceq X
x, y: X
H: x < y
Hle: x ≤ y
Hneq: (x != y)%type
(x ≤ y × x != y)%type
 now split.

X: WellOrderedSet
hX: isdeceq X
x, y: X
H: x < y
Hle: y ≤ x
(x ≤ y × x != y)%type
 induction (H Hle).
Qed.

(** Assuming decidable equality we can prove that < is a trichotomy *)

X: WellOrderedSet
hX: isdeceq X
x, y: X
y < x ∨ x = y ∨ x < y


X: WellOrderedSet
hX: isdeceq X
x, y: X
y < x ∨ x = y ∨ x < y


X: WellOrderedSet
hX: isdeceq X
x, y: X
Heq: (x = y)%type
y < x ∨ x = y ∨ x < y
X: WellOrderedSet
hX: isdeceq X
x, y: X
Hneq: (x != y)%type
y < x ∨ x = y ∨ x < y


X: WellOrderedSet
hX: isdeceq X
x, y: X
Heq: (x = y)%type
y < x ∨ x = y ∨ x < y
 now apply hinhpr, inr, hinhpr, inl.

X: WellOrderedSet
hX: isdeceq X
x, y: X
Hneq: (x != y)%type
y < x ∨ x = y ∨ x < y
 
X: WellOrderedSet
hX: isdeceq X
x, y: X
Hneq: (x != y)%type
Hle: x ≤ y
y < x ∨ x = y ∨ x < y
X: WellOrderedSet
hX: isdeceq X
x, y: X
Hneq: (x != y)%type
Hle: y ≤ x
y < x ∨ x = y ∨ x < y

  
X: WellOrderedSet
hX: isdeceq X
x, y: X
Hneq: (x != y)%type
Hle: x ≤ y
y < x ∨ x = y ∨ x < y
 now apply hinhpr, inr, hinhpr, inr, WOlt'_to_WOlt.
  
X: WellOrderedSet
hX: isdeceq X
x, y: X
Hneq: (x != y)%type
Hle: y ≤ x
y < x ∨ x = y ∨ x < y
 
X: WellOrderedSet
hX: isdeceq X
x, y: X
Hneq: (x != y)%type
Hle: y ≤ x
(y != x)%type

    now intros H; apply Hneq.
Qed.


Definition theSmallest {X : WellOrderedSet} (S : hsubtype X) : hProp
  := (∃ s, S s) ⇒ make_hProp
                (∑ s:X, S s ∧ ∀ t:X, S t ⇒ WOrel X s t)%type
                (isaprop_theSmallest _ (WO_isTotalOrder X) S).

(** actually get the smallest element: *)

X: WellOrderedSet
S: hsubtype X
theSmallest S


X: WellOrderedSet
S: hsubtype X
theSmallest S

  
X: WellOrderedSet
S: hsubtype X
ne: ∃ s : X, S s
make_hProp
  (∑ s : X, S s ∧ (∀ t : X, S t ⇒ s ≤ t))%type
  (isaprop_theSmallest (WOrel X) (WO_isTotalOrder X) S)
 
X: WellOrderedSet
S: hsubtype X
ne: ∃ s : X, S s
(∑ x : X, S x ∧ (∀ y : X, S y ⇒ x ≤ y))
→ make_hProp
    (∑ s : X, S s ∧ (∀ t : X, S t ⇒ s ≤ t))%type
    (isaprop_theSmallest (WOrel X) (WO_isTotalOrder X)
       S)

  
X: WellOrderedSet
S: hsubtype X
ne: ∃ s : X, S s
c: (∑ x : X, S x ∧ (∀ y : X, S y ⇒ x ≤ y))%type
make_hProp
  (∑ s : X, S s ∧ (∀ t : X, S t ⇒ s ≤ t))%type
  (isaprop_theSmallest (WOrel X) (WO_isTotalOrder X) S)
 exact c.
Defined.


X: WellOrderedSet
S: hsubtype X
(∃ s : X, S s)
⇒ (∃! s : X, S s ∧ (∀ t : X, S t ⇒ s ≤ t))


X: WellOrderedSet
S: hsubtype X
(∃ s : X, S s)
⇒ (∃! s : X, S s ∧ (∀ t : X, S t ⇒ s ≤ t))

  
X: WellOrderedSet
S: hsubtype X
ne: ∃ s : X, S s
∃! s : X, S s ∧ (∀ t : X, S t ⇒ s ≤ t)
 
X: WellOrderedSet
S: hsubtype X
ne: ∃ s : X, S s
isaprop (∑ s : X, S s ∧ (∀ t : X, S t ⇒ s ≤ t))%type

ne: ∃ s : X, S s
(∑ s : X, S s ∧ (∀ t : X, S t ⇒ s ≤ t))%type
